title: Knockout Battle
summary:
Knockout Battle is a chaotic and fun multiplayer party game where up to 8 players clash in fully interactive sandbox arenas. The objective is simple yet endlessly entertaining: knock your friends out and hurl them into the void to secure victory!
Unleash absolute mayhem with an arsenal of wacky weapons and gadgets. Throw TNT across the map, blast fireworks and rockets into your rivals, or smash them with Thor’s hammer. Pull out blasters, revolvers, and all sorts of outrageous guns, or go full sci-fi and deflect attacks with a lightsaber.

Potions add another layer of madness, letting you grow huge, shrink tiny, run faster, or hit harder — flipping the fight in unexpected ways.

Every map is a sandbox of destruction, packed with hazards, traps, and interactive elements you can turn against your opponents. From launching rivals sky-high to chaining explosions together, no two matches ever play the same.

Whether you’re dodging rockets, spamming explosives, or laughing as your friends fall into the void, Knockout Battle guarantees non-stop action, hilarious moments, and pure chaos. And of course… expect a ridiculous amount of explosions and rockets.

title: Moonlight Knight

title: Blossoming Yandere

title: Wind Runners

With their superior aerial combat skills, the Wind Runners will bring freedom to all who live under the shadow of oppression!

title: Airport Contraband

Inspect documents, question passengers, scan luggage, and seize illegal goods as you try to maintain control at Caldora Airport. Will you uphold the law or profit from contraband?

title: ExoMecha
summary:
ExoMecha is a brand new free-to-play online competitive first-person shooter that takes place in Omecha, a new and untouched planet with exotic environments. ExoMecha offers you breathtaking gaming experience with its flexible playing style, mechs, unique gadgets and abilities, and boss battles.

​ExoMecha is an immersive experience with team-based large scale battles, a unique battle royale game mode, and an objective-based game mode.

title: Rogue Mansion
summary:
Rogue Mansion is a survival horror game combined with the best of the roguelike genre! Explore a procedurally generated mansion that changes every time you play, and becomes more dangerous and unpredictable according to your level of fear.

Experience the game in different ways, by choosing from multiple unique characters, each with their own equipment, specialist perks, and motivations.

title: Redemption of the Damned
summary:
You are a field doctor's assistant who was heading to a distant village to help local peasants. Someone attacked your stagecoach and you wake up in a mass grave, being the only survivor.

The player fights against monsters and other evil spirits in various biomes of the cursed forest, and the only safe place is the village, where he can complete tasks, recuperate or replenish supplies. In each location the player will meet with the guardian of this zone - the boss, who is the iconic character of the folklore of Western and Eastern Europe. The main goal of the game is to get into the high castle in order to eliminate its owner.

The player's arsenal is represented by a wide range of firearms typical for the chosen era - ancient flintlock pistols, classic revolvers, muskets and rifles, as well as special tools for certain types of enemies like vampires, ghouls, werewolves, swamp creatures, spirits, etc.

What scared you, being myths and scary tales, becomes reality and...attacks!

title: Sparkball
summary: Sparkball is a 4v4 adrenaline-packed ‘sports brawler’ where players select from a cast of lovably unique heroes and carefully balance both ballin' and brawlin' to score in the enemy team's goal! Affectionately described as League of Legends meets Rocket League (or Kung Fu-tbol!), Sparkball grips you immediately with its dopamine-inducing take on combat sports and keeps you coming back for more as you strive to master its surprisingly complex strategies.

title: MegaBattle
summary: Build robots and enter the arena to battle! Robots have taken control of the galaxy and now humans must build bots to fight in the MegaBattle Arena. MegaBattle combines the best of the CCG with innovative mechanics such as unique mana mode, opponent reading attack and a fast card draw system.

title: Dystopicon
summary:
In Dystopicon the players will live in a dystopian society in which they receive money in exchange to watch TV. With that money they pay services to cover their basic needs. Throughout the game they will discover the details of this dystopia in which the government monitors your movements but gives you freedom of choice.

The story will be told through gameplay, texts and comics. Take your time to explore the different objects and the mechanics in your first day.

title: Gowf: A Golf Adventure
summary: Gowf is an arcade style golf game with a classic 3-click hit system. Features an RPG style adventure mode where you can level-up and customize your character's skills and equipment to win tournaments across a variety of courses and online play with up to 8 friends.

title: Occulto

title: Galactic Diner

Maybe there's another way?

summary: You lost your soul in a poker game against the Devil. Now, trapped in the infernal depths, your only hope is to fight your way back to freedom. You’ll face a diverse gallery of monstrous foes in nearly impossible poker battles - but luckily, you’re a cheater.

title: Terradune
summary: Terradune is a hand-drawn 2D action RPG where you battle monsters, discover hidden treasures, and shape your hero’s fate. Explore scorching deserts, moonlit forests, and thrilling dungeons to uncover secrets in this fast-paced, immersive adventure.

title: Lucipurr
summary: Lucipurr is a multiplayer horror game. Players(1-5) try to disrupt a cult’s ritual aimed at harnessing the captivating power of cats. Meanwhile, another player controls a demonic cat and hunts them down.

title: Prism Warriors DX
summary: The Prism Warriors return for another helping of retro-styled bullet hell action. Face off against the sinister Twilight Four, and fight to save more than just your friends...

title: Oddli: A Satisfying Game
summary: ODDLI is a casual puzzle game about creating satisfying loops. Solve moving puzzles where the only obstacle is your past self. Reach the goal with your character, avoid your previous movements and watch it repeat your path. Continue reaching goals, while creating mesmerizing choreographies!

title: Cleaner Company
summary: You have officially joined the elite team of "Star Wipers"! Your mission? Cleaning! Alongside your trusted crew, you will embark on exciting expeditions to abandoned space stations, ruined restaurants in the cosmos, and unexplored planets.

title: Grim Trials
summary: Prove your worth. Hack and blast your way through the Grim Trials. Explore the (after)life of the Academy – a training ground for aspiring Grim Reapers. Befriend fellow Reapers, learn from your mentors, and uncover the secrets of your life and love before your death.

similarGames.name: Marvel Ultimate Alliance 3: The Black Order

title: A Heavy Morning
summary: You know the feeling of struggling to get out of bed? In A Heavy Morning, you will play as a young girl battling with her own mind. Your only objective? Get out of bed and get to work on time.

title: Innocence Rewrite
summary: "Innocence Rewrite" captures the summer before and after the college entrance exam.As old bonds mend and distant feelings return, it's a season of healing amid chaos.No need for correction fluid — just feel, and slowly rewrite the innocence of youth.

title: Arca
summary: News of the Great Flood has reached the South Pole, and rumor has it there's an Ark ready to help... but only one spot per species! Jump, slide, and sabotage your rivals as you race against time to secure your place. It's every penguin for itself and the world against them all!

title: Spacerocks
summary: Mine asteroids, find rare loot, upgrade & modify your ship, build space factories, and destroy your enemies in this next-level space shooter. Just... One... More... Asteroid...

title: Broth Bounty
summary: Broth Bounty is a fast-paced 2D shooter inspired by classic lightgun games. Blast ingredients into a bubbling pot, dodge hazards, and adapt to roguelite challenges as you cook your way to culinary victory!

title: Servant of the Lake
summary: Servant of the Lake is the new premium point-and-click adventure in the Rusty Lake series from the creators of the Cube Escape series, The Past Within and Underground Blossom.

title: Angler's Journey
summary: Idle Clicker fishing game where you attack with different weapons to catch fishes, sell them to upgrade your equipment, unlock new skills. Explore diverse fishing spots, challenge mighty boss fishes, and strive to complete your massive fish collection.

title: Soulforge: Lost Path
summary: In Soulforge: Lost Path (Survivors-like), become a legendary hunter slaughtering endless Corrupted Souls. Scavenge Sacred Remains to forge Exorcist Artefacts, manage limited inventory strategically, and uncover the world's festering corruption truth.

similarGames.name: Nights of Azure 2: Bride of the New Moon

title: Road Truckers: New Beginning
summary:
Live a trucker’s life in the first trucking sim RPG. Explore villages, cities and wilderness in a fully customizable truck. Get on-foot to eat, sleep, and help people along the way. Your goal: to bring back prosperity in your region. Drive, grow, and inspire!

Experience trucking on a new level: by driving and interacting with the world around you. Make your truck unique by customizing it mechanically and visually, inside and outside. Meet people and decide how to approach them. Enjoy the beautiful scenery in different weather conditions. But most of all, see the change you’re making by supporting the economy.

title: The Shores of Stellaluna
summary: Sail a fractured world. Battle through dangerous dungeons, Stack powerful abilities, Rebuild cities, Manage trade, Survive ever-changing islands to gather lumen, get more powerful and shape the fate of a broken world in this first person craft and build focused RPG with a strong storyline.

title: Woodrot
summary: You're the maintenance man for an apartment complex that has mysteriously been transported to the middle of the ocean. Woodrot is a surreal adventure game about getting to know your neighbors who all seem to blame themselves for their recent relocation.

similarGames.name: $$$://Somnialys, I Am Tired So I Bought a Couple Dreams

title: Schizophrenia: R.E.M. Protocol
summary: Schizophrenia is a game where you have to not go crazy and get out of the bunker. Use all the items you can find to survive. Remember. The main thing is not to go crazy. And further. Don't make loud noises. They can hear you.

title: Papa Needs a Headshot
summary: Papa Needs a Headshot is a brutal western-steampunk FPS soaked in kin blood. Rip through flesh and bend the battlefield with your cursed metal arm. Use every bullet wisely to slaughter freaks and abominations on your warpath. Keep enduring only to put a bullet in the skull of the man who made you.

title: Talewarden: Riders of the New Day
summary: Talewarden is a weird west adventure visual novel. Restore time on a planet where the sun never sets as you explore locations, talk, romance, and bond with your companions. Find the source of the voice in your head and discover why you all fell here from different worlds.

title: Golden Gambit
summary: Spin. Gamble. Conquer the Machine. Golden Gambit is a slot machine roguelite where every choice is a gamble. Build insane combos, unlock risky modifiers, and push your luck to the limit… or crash and burn trying. Use unique powers with each slot machine to win the Golden Gambit.

similarGames.name: My Hero Academia: Clash! Heroes Battle

title: Covenant 21
summary: Defeat the Covenant, round after round, using the mechanics of Black Jack and help yourself with powerful power-ups.

title: Cubex
summary: Cubex is a horror escape room game in first person, collaborative (or not) for up to 4 players, where your objective will be to find the exit of a giant cube.

title: Freestyle Football 2
summary: Freestyle Football 2 is a fast-paced, 5v5 match-based online multiplayer soccer game. Each position has a unique role, and you'll utilize a variety of strategies and skills to achieve victory with your team. Stylish play and unique characters transform the pitch into a stage.

title: Combat Train TD
summary: This is a tower-defense roguelike strategy game centered around combat trains. Select a suitable base, carefully plan orbital routes, upgrade your combat trains, create an unique build, and then defeat the endless waves of monsters.

title: We Need an Army
summary: We Need An Army is a fantasy roguelike grid based deck builder about recruiting a powerful army! Recruit units, match patterns, and upgrade your grid in this tactical roguelike slots-based deckbuilder.

title: Hollow Stories: Lockdown
summary: A neo-retro survival horror noir game where you explore, solve puzzles, and fight to survive in a city ruled by corruption and cults.

title: Hero of Sunset
summary: Venture into this retro pixel art action-adventure with an open world. Explore, fight, solve puzzles, challenge bosses — and, most importantly, you can romance the cute girls!

title: War of Banners
summary: "Start with a handful of soldiers and rise to become a lord who shakes the battlefield!" The game is a medieval-style strategy/real-time combat RPG. Explore a vast land, raise your knights, and conquer new territories. A free mercenary, a loyal noble, or the ruler of an empire. Choose your path.

title: Dino Citadel
summary: Command a castle-on-a-dino through a corrupted world. Rescue fallen allies, lead them in battle, and build your deck. Manage your economy to draw cards and confront the Voidrift in this tactical roguelike deckbuilder.

title: Operation Highjump: The Fall of Berlin
summary: In the last days of World War II, lead a suicide mission to hunt down the enemy leaders, steal their experimental technology and recover the art pieces and relics. A combination of frenetic action, tactical missions and an explosive run & gun platforming adventure.

title: Destiny Is Dice
summary: The knight ‘Ail’ awoke in a dungeon where everything is decided by dice. Right beside ‘Grin’, witch who can manipulate every die. With this witch's help, ‘Ail’ heads toward the dungeon. To rescue someone trapped within it. Roll, manipulate, and change fate in turn-based roguelike. ‘Destiny Is Dice’.

title: Breath of the Pasture
summary: A heartfelt life-sim about love, land, and the magic of the countryside. Compose your very own pastoral symphony— Listen to the rain as it falls. Chase the breeze on sunny days. Watch crops reach for the sky. Let your cows and sheep rest in peace. Fall in love. Grow a farm. That is THE GAME!

title: Golden Swirl
summary: GOLDEN SWIRL is a Roguelike Deck Builder blending fast-paced action with strategic card play in a dark fantasy world. Journey through shifting dungeons, uncover swirl secrets, and adapt to challenges with unique cards, relics, and a depravity system.

title: Forsaken Lands
summary: Brave heroes unite to challenge the gods themselves and decide the fate of the world! Dive into an epic roguelite deckbuilder adventure. Gather your friends and take on divine foes together in thrilling online co-op battles!

title: The Last Keeper
summary: Take on the role of a lighthouse keeper on a remote island. Maintain the machinery, use the radio and the map to guide ships into the harbor. Survive and uncover the mysteries of Farpoint Island in a horror experience inspired by Voices of the Void and No One Lives Under the Lighthouse.

title: Blast Head
summary: Blast Head is a fast-paced action roguelite/bullet heaven with absurd weapons, powerful runes, and non-linear weapon skill trees. Dive into 10–30 minute runs, discover wild synergies, and unleash chaos across alien arenas.

title: Catio Simulator
summary: Catio Simulator is a relaxing idle game in which you decorate a catio to attract cats. Pet your cats to get them ready for adoption, collect adoption fees, and buy new decorations and petting abilities!

title: Cheat Death
summary: Cheat Death is a horror rogue-lite game where you gamble with the Grim Reaper. The dice are loaded, the deck is stacked against you, and the only way to win is to CHEAT. Use cards, dice, and every trick in the book to survive this high-stakes encounter.

title: Nophenia
summary: explore atmospheric dreams of vagrant but familiar memories.

title: Gloom Punks
summary: Not your average co-op roguelike. Where the price for power is death, and you’re trapped in a gloom-scape of fever dreams and fairytales gone feral, you can only rely on Punks like yourself. Cheat death, bounce back, and take on a world that so badly wants you dead!

title: The Gate Must Stand
summary: Fend off brutal waves of demonic hordes as a mobile hero amongst your stationary allies. As the city’s last line of defense, recruit followers, unlock upgrades, and synergize skills to hold the line against apocalyptic bosses. Remember: heroes can fall, but the gate must stand.

title: Nocturnal Visitors: Book One
summary: Discover a world where magic and science, chaos and order, are two sides of the same coin.

title: Ruin: Beast City
summary: Assassinate your targets with style, as you uncover a plot of world domination and ancient horrors in this boss fight action game. Dive deep into the dark ruins of the Beast City, where only lunatic killers remain.

title: Scopecreep
summary: A whispering flame craves souls. With each offering, your resolve strengthens. Fight spirits, collect their essences, and feed a hunger that may never subside in this short active incremental.

title: Age of Wonders 4: Secrets of the Archmages
summary: Unravel the Power of the Cosmos in Age of Wonders 4: Secrets of the Archmages. Follow Athla’s Wizard Kings through the Astral Sea, discover their secret arts, and face the perils they left behind. Features story realms, tomes, and wildlife.

title: Cat Isle
summary:
Cat Isle is a cozy pixel art management game inspired by Japan’s famous Cat Islands. It blends light management elements with a strong focus on atmosphere and player expression. While managing different types of shop supplies and understanding cat preferences is part of the experience, the game centers more on relaxing gameplay, fishing, interacting with cats, decorating buildings, and simply observing the world you create.
Players can unlock decorations through a Gashapon machine and customize shops and surroundings to shape the island’s look and feel. As you build and decorate, the island slowly transforms into a cozy space full of cute cats.

title: The Stalked 3
summary: A late-night thrill turns into a nightmare. Olivia sneaks into Creepwood Wonderland Carnival with her boyfriend, expecting a fun night alone in the park. But something feels off. Distant footsteps. Faint whispers. Someone else is here… Watching.

title: Mobile Phone Shop Simulator
summary: Build and manage your own mobile phone shop! Buy, sell and expand your business in this detailed simulation game. Balance profits, manage your team, and become the best shop in town.

title: Drive Me Broke
summary: Build your dream car! The cops are always on your back, so stay on good terms with them... Also, be prepared to do any job that requires money.

title: Ultra Damage
summary: Ultra Damage is a hand-drawn Boomer Shooter packed with humor and action, featuring hand-crafted visuals and a story blending gritty detective work with absurd comedy. Each level is a wild ride. Unravel the mystery, find hidden clues, and deal ultra damage to save humanity!

title: Push Through Hell
summary: Survival roguelite, where endless waves of monsters and enemies try to stop you from completing your objective. Choose your character, find upgrades and defeat bosses. Will you be able to move The Core all the way to the end, or will you die trying?

title: The Shadow Cosmos
summary: A 3D metroidvania with retro aesthetic. As master peacock, delve into a mysterious, dream-like world with non-linear exploration and progression, stylish and challenging fights with a powerful halberd, tricky parkour and puzzles. Collect shadows, unleash darkness.

title: Glisynth
summary: Glisynth is a rhythm game that uses two types of notes. The Q row on the keyboard is used for yellow notes, while the A row is used for white notes.

title: Shelf Life
summary: Solve your supervisor's deadly task sequence to survive, but be warned: every wrong guess makes the store a more monstrous labyrinth. Unravel the horrific code and finally clock out, or be a permanent employee.

title: Tóng Dāo Yín Jiàn
summary: During the Xining period of the Northern Song Dynasty, a treacherous prime minister wreaked havoc on the imperial court. He engaged in militarism without regard for the rich and the poor. Using his position as a court official, he obstructed the lending practices of landlords, favoring the common people over the gentry. Undeterred by the will of Heaven, he attempted to divert the Yellow River, a move that would etch his name in history. Fearing this move would destroy the lifeblood of the Song Dynasty, the underworld rallied around a general, a knight-errant, an assassin, and a thief, known as the "Four Swordsmen," to bring down the treacherous prime minister Wang Anshi.

title: Twilight Protocol
summary: Twilight Protocol is an atmospheric detective horror about an employee who becomes trapped in a corporate mystery. Explore the city, gather clues, talk to locals and colleagues, and uncover the truth hidden beneath the surface.

title: GU Fighters
summary: GU Fighters is an action roguelike where you unlock and upgrade new abilities after every round of combat. Play with up to 4 players locally or online to create your own unique build and be the first to win, or go solo/co-op to traverse varying environments and defeat hordes of enemies.

similarGames.name: Nights of Azure 2: Bride of the New Moon

title: Pair-A-Dice
summary: Decide your fate with a game of Pair-A-Dice. A strategic fight to relinquish your cards with dice that match, while Navigating a strange world with even stranger inhabitants. Despite what they claim, no one seems to play fair. Will you?

title: Skinwalker: First Blood
summary: Skinwalker is a hack n’ slash action platformer where you swear allegiance to a formidable beast to save your daughter from a terminal illness. Shapeshift into the creature’s monstrous form and wield untamed wrath in exchange for its freedom and the promise of a cure.

similarGames.name: Ori and the Will of the Wisps

title: Under Heaven or Hell
summary:
You wake up in Hell with no memory of how you got there, and no clear way out.

To return home, you will have to survive the brutal politics of this realm and forge alliances with two dangerous devils and an enigmatic angel, each with their own secrets, and temptations that may pull you closer.

Will you escape with your soul intact, or will your path become forever tied to those who linger within the flames?

Your choices will shape your fate, and perhaps, the fate of Hell itself.

title: Karate Rogue
summary: A fusion of martial arts and roguelike dungeon crawling—build your fighter, master lethal techniques, and conquer the abyss with your fists alone. Strike. Survive. Evolve.

title: PiPu Party
summary: PiPu Party is a chaotic party puzzle-platformer game with a shared 3-slot symbol backpack. Pick and put symbols to alter the level. Co-op or outsmart your friends.

title: Approximately Up
summary: Build, crash, rebuild! Explore new planets with your fully modular spaceship made from whatever bolts together long enough to fly. Mount giant thrusters, annoying cables, and everything in between. Complete wild missions, face the dangers of space and argue with your crew!

title: The Loopler
summary: The Loopler is a idle-like roguelite simulation of a car driving in loops. Pick upgrades, place gates and sit back and relax as the mesmerizing loop gets going and the dopamine hits of numbers going up fills your brain. See if you can go endless and beyond.

title: Guilty Pleasures
summary: You are Marcus Holmes, a young private detective and nephew of the legendary detective Arthur Holmes, known among the elite as the “Detective of Passion” — a man who uncovered the intimate secrets of the rich and famous: affairs, love triangles, model disappearances, scandals in high society.

title: Abyssal Anarchy
summary: A fast-paced co-op spell-hell where each map pulls you deeper into the Abyss. Choose from 5 heroes and 14 spells, unlock upgrades, and survive alone or with friends as the magic grows wilder with every descent.

title: An Eggstremely Hard Game
summary: Two geese. One fragile egg. Infinite chaos. Work together to carry it through unpredictable challenges without breaking it, every crack makes it harder, every mistake more hilarious. A co-op physics game about teamwork, clumsiness, and the unstoppable power of honking.

title: Imagine Future
summary: "Imagine Future" is a Visual Novel with a campus theme. You will follow the perspective of the protagonist Ji Wang, experience the life of a high school student. The final examination seemed so far away. one day, it was close at hand. Standing at the crossroads of life, what choice will you make?

title: Erosion
summary: Your daughter's been kidnapped. Every death costs you a decade. Explore a roguelike open world where your actions reshape the timeline. Join a cult, steal a ride, gamble Cheddar. Collect 100+ weapons and abilities, demolish destructible voxel dungeons. Can you save her before time steals her away?

title: Timberflow: Sawmill Simulator
summary: From a single tree to an entire industry! Manage and automate your lumber business in this relaxing, yet challenging Sawmill Simulator. Start small, grow rich, dominate the market.

title: Overtrick
summary: A trick-taking roguelike with style! Outplay your rivals, purchase special abilities, and dazzle 1920s high society with your unstoppable cardplay. Call your contract, follow suit, flush trumps, and claim the hand. This isn't your grandma's bridge club... this is Overtrick!

title: Fallosophy
summary: Use just two buttons to climb a colossal pinball table spanning the history of western philosophy. Fallosophy is a minimalist game that turns pinball into a quiet struggle against gravity. No score. No tilts. No savers. Falling down means climbing back up again. Why climb? What does it all mean?

title: Shield of Breaker
summary: Shield of Breaker is a single-player Action-RPG set in a fantasy world. Protect your castle from endless waves of enemies and turn the tide of battle by deflecting their own blazing fireballs. Choose your hero, upgrade your powers,. Each victory unlocks your path to defend new lands in your realm.

title: Time Travel Train
summary: Time Travel Train is a roguelite incremental game about commanding a weaponized locomotive through history. Battle enemies, and upgrade your train to become an unstoppable force. Your train never stops moving. Keep it fueled, destroy everything in your path, and collect scrap from the wreckage.

similarGames.name: Nights of Azure 2: Bride of the New Moon

title: FamCram
summary: FamCram is a 3D grid-based puzzle game about two dads putting their kids to bed. Guide the children through increasingly challenging and multicultural settings, each with unique items, mechanics, and humor.

title: TankRat
summary: A dying world, flesh given way to steel. Swarms of corrupted mech-monsters roam a desolated land. Search and destroy, scavenge and dismantle, rebuild yourself from the wreckage. What you take becomes what you are. Survive the wasteland. Make it to Highpoint.

title: Nidos
summary: A strategic nature-themed card battler where animals fight for territory, survival, and dominance. Create habitats, control resources, and outsmart your opponents in the wild!

title: Ephemeral Frame
summary: Step inside picture frames, films, and other imagery that connect a variety of dreamscapes in this surreal first-person exploration game.

title: Orbital Chaos
summary: A physics-based bullet hell that's all about gravity - with you as the center of it!

title: Inferno Protocol
summary: Trapped in a deadly labyrinth, you and 5 friends must scavenge, craft, and survive. Harvest monster parts for gear, inject experimental syringes to gain unique skills, and navigate trap-filled corridors. In this 6-player horror survival, you must evolve to escape.

title: Contraband Police - Crimson Fall
summary: It is the year 1983, a month has passed since the end of the Great War. The situation in the territories of the former Republic of Kagastam remains tense. The remnants of General Morin's army are engaged in bloody battles with representatives of the new regime. As an experienced war veteran, you are appointed as the commander of an outpost located at the very heart of the ongoing conflict.

title: A Philosophical Discussion of Worms
summary: A Philosophical Discussion of worms is a Kinetic Visual Novel that explores two characters, Vynder and Ophiel, as they navigate cohabitation in a strange, unfamiliar house when they don't speak the same language.

title: Rewindead
summary: Rewindead is a single-player, third-person shooter about contract killing in time loops. Assassinate your target, rewind time, then eliminate your past selves before they complete the hit.

title: Neighbor Master
summary: Your neighbor just bought a SPORTS CAR. You? You're broke. But you have a shovel and a backyard full of... opportunity. Dig, melt, and bottle snow to build a "Premium Glacier Water" empire. Send in the drones, upgrade your gear, and save up for a ride that will make his car look like a cheap toy.

title: Func Key
summary: Deck out your keyboard with powerful upgrades in this roguelike word-builder. Snap on keycaps to buff entire rows or columns, install "broken" function keys, and pick your projects as you rise from a lowly intern to a corporate legend.

title: Tiny House Finds
summary: Search inside and around cozy 3D houses, floor by floor, in a relaxing 3D hidden object game full of tiny details.

title: Frontier: Path of Shadows
summary: Fight enemies, upgrade your squad, and explore new planets! Make tough choices and shape the fate of an entire sector in Frontier: Path of Shadows. Experience a richly crafted 25th-century world and tactical combat where X-COM meets Final Fantasy.

title: Don’t Stop Smiling
summary: Smile—and survive. A first-person “forced-smile” horror game that tracks your facial expression in real time. PC camera required.

title: Taking Today Off
summary: Taking Today Off is a light-hearted roguelike deck-builder about managing modern life states. Draw cards, place them on the board, add stickers and tools, and build playful combos. Easy to learn, with fresh choices and strategies every run.

title: Pearls of Wisdom
summary: A rogue-like mindfulness deck builder with real-world side quests. The game involves matching quotes, using power-ups ('emblems'), and undertaking mindfulness tasks to increase the score.

title: Glitchia
summary: GLiTCHiA is an adventure that blends a 2D retro game with a 3D horror space Keep an eye on the door behind you, then use gimmicks and glitches to find what matters as you explore a lost series. Uncover why the ending went wrong, and save the game’s protagonist, Aby.

title: Kaiju Inc.
summary: Kaiju Inc. is a Real-Time Tactics + Roguelike Monster Raising game! Mutate, Modify, and Evolve your monsters! Build your strongest monster squad through Roguelike stages!

title: Fall of the Final Age
summary: Take command of the last Stronghold of humanity, fighting back against the advancing monsters. Decide where to prioritize the forces of your Heroes, as the number of turns before the invasion is limited. A turn-based tactical strategy with RPG and roguelike elements.

title: Just One More Link
summary: A dark arcade incremental roguelite. Invest ZEK to buy time, chain crystals for exponential value, and cash out before collapse. Welcome to Blagine Corp. No refunds.

title: Outside
summary: Dares reality game show — with cameras, neighbors, and escalation. Your friends dare you. Then lie, sabotage, and bet on your failure. Fail a dare and you’re sent OUTSIDE — escalating into strangers, neighbors, or real-world dares on camera (optional, phone supported).

title: Flock of the Seraphim
summary: Adopt gun-wielding angels that help you exorcise waves demons in this horde survival roguelite. Gain power by purging depraved demonic enemies, collecting loot, and improving your flock to create unique builds of holy power. Do you have enough faith to survive?

title: HyperRouter
summary: A fast-paced, mind-melting, reality-twisting 3D platformer for the digital age. You are a Router, running files to every corner of the internet while a reactive soundtrack accentuates your every leap. Learn to traverse the unfathomable geometries of an untamed Netspace, and NEVER. SLOW. DOWN.

title: Little Woody
summary: Little Woody is a 2D point-and-click puzzle adventure where you guide a small wooden soul through a mysterious world of shifting environments. Meet unusual companions along the way, solve handcrafted logic puzzles, explore atmospheric locations and uncover a forgotten past.

title: Adventurers Shop
summary: Forge your legacy as both merchant and hero. Explore Zoldar, battle monsters for rare materials, and craft epic gear. Team up with friends to build a thriving shop in the village markets or arm yourselves to conquer the dangerous depths of the wild.

title: Koikata: How Our Love Grows
summary: An all-ages remaster of Koi Suru Kimochi no Kasanekata, with upgraded resolution, new features and Ichika route, which was not present in the original game.

title: AstroDiner Manager
summary: It is a fast-paced diner sim set on an asteroid where you serve alien customers, upgrade your restaurant, and uncover the mystery hidden beneath.

title: Alonitaire
summary: Break the rules of solitaire in this atmospheric roguelike deckbuilder. Unleash forbidden sigils while the Jack of Spades begs for your help in secret. Forge game-breaking combos under the Joker’s watchful eye and uncover the truth behind the deck. Don’t investigate… just play.

title: Echoes From Ciudadela
summary:
Echoes from Ciudadela is a first-person adventure and puzzle-solving game focused on exploration, environmental storytelling, and narrative discovery. You play as Katari, who follows the trail of his recently dead father after uncovering his journal, that leads him to a sealed mountain known as Ciudadela.

Throughout the journey, your main artifact is a Balearic sling, a tool tied to both the environment and the forgotten technologies hidden within the mountain. As you dive deeper and solve puzzles, you’ll unlock journal entries left behind by Katari’s father. Each revealing pieces of a lost civilization and their connection to time, invention, and legacy.

title: Tom Lander: The Exiled King
summary: Pilot wacky aerial vehicles with QWOP-inspired controls through colorful retro-futuristic levels. Struggle to stay airborne while performing deliveries, rescues, firefighting missions, bombing runs, and chaotic dogfights. This game will remind you that flying is hard, but landing is harder.

title: Guildamation
summary: Guildamation is an Idle AutoBattling RPG that let's you build an automate a guild.

title: Friendslop Drive
summary: Friendslop Drive is a chaotic co‑op driving game where one car is shared by multiple players. As one of the top friendslop games, teamwork and rivalry collide on a mysterious island. Can your crew reach the PEAK of madness and escape together? Only the best bros survive the ride!

title: Dino Time Raiders
summary: Travel back in time to capture dinosaurs and turn them into profit! Lead a team of scientists through chaotic time-travel missions, catch prehistoric beasts, and build the ultimate dino park. Manage research, upgrades, and disasters - all in the name of science and the free market.

title: NebulArena
summary:
Nebularena immerses you in futuristic PvP battles on space platforms, completely automated through your strategy. You will create the ultimate ship that will confront the constructions of other players in deathmatches where anything goes...

Build, customize, and unleash your ultimate space platform in NebulArena, a fast-paced, fully automated PvP arena where strategy, design, and destruction collide!

title: Gone Digging
summary: Dig together by day. Feed the darkness by night. A 1–4 player co-op digging thriller where loot, upgrades, and sacrifices decide who survives after sundown.

title: Prismarch
summary: A colorful chess roguelike! Engage in dopaminergic, cinematic strategy while you fulfill a chess power fantasy - your pieces gain abilities as you construct a juiced up roster capable of surviving the onslaught! Only - seven mysterious prismatic kings stand before you and the one true crown...

title: Eco Volunteer
summary: A peaceful, cozy game about cleaning up trash and other eco-friendly activities in nature. Embark on a journey through stunning natural landscapes while doing good deeds!

title: Saint George's Tavern
summary:
Hilarious tavern simulator set in the early 1800's. Take food and drinks orders, catch and cook the food, pour ales and serve. A cozy game that occasionally ramps up the pace for a short while with tavern fights, drinking games, arm wrestling, happy slaps and many more.
Decorate your tavern ready for Christmas and watch as a choir of chickens sing Christmas carols to entertain your customers.
Earn money, buy new items, hire a worker, and increase your tavern rating. The tavern with the highest rating in London will be hosting King George III for Christmas dinner - guaranteed to be an absolute spectacle!!

title: Bones and Coins
summary: An incremental auto battler dungeon crawler where you slay enemies and loot items. Build a synergized hero party, unlock weapons with unique attack styles. Gear up your team and explore new dungeon rooms filled with enemies and legendary drops.

title: Arcade Shop Simulator
summary: Run your arcade shop! Bargain for machines, set them up, and let kids enjoy the fun. Earn money, keep your shop clean, and customize it with stylish accessories. Need more space? Expand your shop and build the ultimate arcade empire, then play your Arcades after hours and compete with other players!

title: Entity Research Group

title: Canvas of Thoughts
summary: Canvas of Thoughts is an cozy point-and-click puzzle adventure which invites you into Evi's vibrant but loud inner world. Experience everyday situations through shifting colours, sounds and emotions. Solve reflective puzzles and navigate the world not through words, but through feelings.

title: Orbital Traffic Controller
summary: Orbital Traffic Controller is a sci-fi spaceship management game set in the Solar System. Become an interstellar traffic controller, directing vessels from planetary holding patterns and warp gates to atmospheric reentry, all while avoiding collisions with other spacecraft and planetary bodies.

title: Puzzlor
summary: A strategic rogue-lite puzzle game where you collect and place Tetris-style pieces to defeat fantasy villains, unlock characters and upgrades, and build powerful runs. Focused on replayability, quick sessions, and meaningful strategic choices. Set in a traditional high fantasy world.

title: Hoosegow: Prison Survival
summary: Hoosegow — a dark comedy about life behind bars. A random convict, a random charge, a random sentence. One goal: survive at any cost. Every decision opens new paths — or leads to death.

title: Storm the Field
summary: Among a Viking tribe, you wield rune-magic in a puzzle version of chess with abilities instead of pawns. Cast powerful abilities onto enemy forces in calculated patterns and clear the board over successive turns.

title: Horse & Horse
summary:
Horse & Horse is a chaotic medieval party PvP game where warrior horses battle across dynamic arenas filled with traps, platforms, and unpredictable hazards. Players can fight with melee weapons, ranged gear, magic, shields, and mythical equipment while trying to outplay their opponents in fast-paced multiplayer matches.

Designed for both local and online play, Horse & Horse focuses on quick, funny, and competitive battles for up to 8 players. Each match turns the arena into a ridiculous horse-powered battlefield where timing, movement, weapon choice, and pure chaos decide the winner.

title: Brothel Virgin: The Crimson Reverie
summary: Your first night in a brothel. Nervous? Excited? You’ve got one night to pick your companion — or unlock a hidden VIP experience. Animated scenes, wild choices, and more secrets than you can handle.

title: Scriver: A Word Game
summary: In this word-crafting roguelike deckbuilder, you buy, sell, and arrange art in your gallery strategically to build synergies and impress the colorful cast of characters. Every piece of art, gift shop item, and critic can drastically change the course of each run.

title: Dissolution of the Silent Union
summary: Dissolution of the Silent Union is a short, narrative-driven visual novel where you accompany Vera, who is trapped on the last day of school, toward her inevitable date.

title: Angels Online Global
summary: Angels Online Global is a charming 2D fantasy MMORPG featuring flexible builds, faction warfare, and deep customization. Enjoy 4× leveling, expanded inventory, real-time chat translation, and dungeon-earned outfits with fusion upgrades!

title: Idle Chapel
summary: A dark-fantasy incremental game about confronting a rising cult. Seek out worshipers who turned to darker gods and smite them back to the light. Harness their devotion to grow stronger and purge the land of evil - one click at a time.

title: Biotone
summary: A pitch-controlled brick breaker where you move the paddle with your voice. Travel through 8 biomes brought to life with retro-inspired sound and visuals.

title: Quack Quack Up
summary: A voice-controlled party game that will have you and your friends screaming until you pass out! Drop the controller and use your vocal cords to herd a flock of ducks to the finish line—or watch them all yeet off a cliff because someone yelled a bit too loud!

title: Agraria
summary:
Agraria is a single-player farming simulation game in which players become a Shared Land Agricultural Engineer for Agraria Inc. Starting with a small plot of land, players cultivate crops, manage soil conditions, harvest produce, expand their farm, and develop increasingly efficient agricultural systems.

The game features seasonal crop planning, orchards, beekeeping, livestock, irrigation, fertilizers, market tracking, contracts, production recipes, and farm automation. Players can process goods through canning, dehydration, brewing, and factory systems while working toward higher ranks and larger plots within Agraria Inc.’s shared-land program.

Designed with an emphasis on farming and production management, Agraria focuses on planting, harvesting, upgrading, and optimizing the farm rather than social obligations or town-life schedules.

title: A Lost Man
summary: A fully hand-drawn point & click adventure game. 1916. Somewhere deep in the night. War. Death. Play as a lost man, stuck between two front lines. Traverse a desolate countryside, facing unusual encounters, bursts of violence, and mystical surges.

title: Wugou Zhi Lian: Zhanfang Yu Chun Zhi Huahai
Looking Up I See Only A Ceiling: The Recall
summary:
After everything that happened, while sorting through cardboard boxes, you find some old VHS tapes.

They hold your best memories, moments when everything felt simpler.

But…something feels off.

Enjoy this new spin-off short story from “Looking Up I See Only A Ceiling”, made in collaboration with our game “7 Days To Think About It”.

title: The Old Man and His Cat
summary: Play as Domino, a stray cat in love with food, in this heartwarming adventure where you help an old man overcome his grief after his wife passed away. Use your feline skills to explore and solve puzzles as you strive to bring joy into the old man's life and build an unbreakable bond with him.

title: Evolution Survival
summary: Evolution Survival is a survival game where the universe evolves around you. The plants and animals you saw at the beginning will be different at the end, They may not even be there, the star may have gone supernova or shrunk into a white dwarf. Who knows when Natural Selection is at the wheel!

title: Block Catching
summary: An online game of block catching with a twist. The catcher is not your friend.

title: Tomboy Adventure 2
summary: Start a relaxing adventure together with your (girl) friend!

title: Love in Space
summary: It is the year 2009. A short time after "the incident". Mankind has fled the scorched crusts of planet earth for a better life in space. Those unlucky few who still reside on earth are forced to live beneath the sea in leaky metal domes. This includes you... 50% Visual Novel - 50% Karaoke-Musical.

title: Cat-Astrophy
summary: Guide Polo, a brave abducted cat, through a vast universe of exotic planets. Face challenging combats, customize your abilities, and choose your own path in this epic space odyssey to uncover Polo’s lost memories.

title: Mistfall Hunter
summary: Mistfall Hunter is a third-person action PvPvE extraction RPG. Gear up for different classes, master combos and strategic skills, and face intense battles against monsters or players, solo or with teammates. Only a successful escape will secure your treasures.

title: SpeedRunners 2: King of Speed
summary: The ultimate competitive platformer is back! Outrun, outjump, and outsmart your rivals in cutthroat online/local races, now up to 8 players. Master the movement, learn meticulously designed maps, use powerful pick-ups, swing around with a grappling hook, and don't get knocked off-screen!

title: Project Reboot
summary:
Project Reboot is a fan-made remaster of Pixel Worlds brought to you by the community! Made for everyone by everyone.

Fully Free-To-Play with zero in-game transactions.

title: Thumps & Blows
summary: Chaos and fun are guaranteed in this fighting game, where a quirky cast of stickmen battle each other using ridiculous techniques in fast-paced fights with easy-to-learn yet unexpectedly deep mechanics.

similarGames.name: CatFight: The Ultimate Female Fighting Game

title: Empire in Decay
summary:
Empire in Decay is a roguelike deckbuilding turn-based tactical game, loosely based on chess. Its gameplay has been broadened with the use of cards and the progression of units. In the game, you'll proceed through procedurally generated routes across the districts of Daandria, the capital of the Empire.
In your journey to the Throne Hall to face the King, you will have to fight turn-based combats through different locations, collect cards and upgrade them, recruit units to support your cause and enhance them, find relics and forge artifacts to boost your powers, and use all your cunning and skill to make your way through waves of enemies.

title: Tales of Tonbrook
summary: Tales of Tonbrook is a life-sim/RPG hybrid. When you receive an invitation to the prestigious Daverton Adventurer's Academy, you take it! Study, perform missions for the school to pay your way, explore the world, make friends, fish, farm, find hidden ruins, and much more!

title: Plum Road Tea Dream
summary: Plum Road Tea Dream tells the semi-autobiographical story of 'S', a young game designer who creates virtual sanctuaries that reflect their own introspective journey out of need for safe havens, new rituals and space for grief.

title: Fractured Library
summary: A cozy 2D pixel art adventure where you explore magical worlds, solve whimsical puzzles, and collect crystal fragments to restore a misbehaving library: no combat, just curious discoveries and a dash of chaos.

title: Mimicry!
summary: Blend into the environment and eat objects around you as a sneaky Mimic, or burn, zap, and explode everything as a crafty Exterminator to root out the Mimics in this Prop-Hunt inspired multiplayer game of chaos and frenetic fun!

title: A Dogs Dream
summary: Test your sixth sense. Will you eat a wild rabbit, or tie someone to the train tracks? Every choice is yours to make. May you find a reason to laugh inside your nightmares.

title: Suncraft
summary: Another sun-filled day begins in this cozy pixel-art adventure. Gather resources, craft items, and upgrade tools to expand the land. Can you rebuild the grand Lighthouse and bring the village back to its golden days?

title: Thirsty Princess
summary: Thirsty Princess is a fast-paced, top-down party game for 2–4 local players where you and your friends compete to drink beer with an impatient and unreasonable princess. Get drunk and slowly lose control while you brawl, steal from and sabotage your friends to win the favour of your princess.

title: Valkyrie Tune: Synthesis of Souls
summary:
A visual novel that brings the "Valkyrie Tune" plastic model series by Good Smile Company to life.
Experience the resonant story of an amnesiac protagonist and six stunning heroines, whose intertwining serenade of love, sorrow, and fateful encounters calls forth a reboot for the future.

title: Dig, Dig, Die
summary: Online co-op horror for 1–6 players. Board a cursed flying ship, raid haunted graveyards for loot, and survive monsters that hear every sound. Beware of UFO abductions, grab boosters from vending machines, gamble in the onboard casino, and embrace pure chaos with friends in voice chat.

title: Ella's Nightmare
summary: Linear single-player game with puzzles and alternate endings. Control Ella and explore the rooms of the house, solving puzzles to progress and escape before becoming a victim of the lurking creature.

title: Chasm Shift
summary: A 2D pixelated platformer journey through a mysterious and vast maze of puzzle box dungeons. Solve puzzle-infused platforming challenges and uncover new abilities as you plunge into an atmospheric adventure.

title: Top Drifters
summary: A frantic top-down racer with simple old-school arcade controls, vibrant low-poly graphics, high-speed chaotic races and physics-based, drifting-focused driving. Master 10+ different cars with unique driving stats, tear through unconventional. semi destructible tracks and become the "Top Drifter".

summary: Solve tile based lawn puzzles. Explore the grounds of a forgotten manor. Discover mysterious flora and figure out their rules. Cut grass and have fun!

title: Escape: Immersion
summary: Escape: Immersion is a horror adventure inspired by Inside and Little Nightmares. An atmospheric survival adventure with puzzles, platforming, and unpredictable challenges inside a collapsing underwater lab.

title: Cat Squeeze
summary: Cat Squeeze is a cozy, brain-teasing cat puzzle game. Playing as an explosive kitten, use the extrusion of the pipeline, and navigate a maze to collect fish treats! Solve puzzles with precise blasts to escape, or get trapped by the soft maze.

title: Antichrist
summary: As a journalist, you made headlines back in 2006 with a groundbreaking story. Years later, an anonymous call tied to that very event leads you to an horror house. But this house may belong to the Antichrist believed to appear at the end of days. You’re chasing a story… but it might be your last.

title: Phantom Floor
summary: You are trapped on the Phantom Floor. You must find a way to escape, but keep quiet, it's always listening.

title: Galdromeda
summary: Turn-based RPG with space combat. Assemble a crew, each having their own unique abilities, level up, upgrade your ship and your crew's abilities, collect new outfits for your crew.

title: Planet Flipper
summary: A short turn-based planet management sim about flipping a world for profit. Balance supply, unrest, famine, and conflict. Or let it collapse and cash out before it’s too late.

title: EverQuest Legends
summary: Step back into Norrath in EverQuest Legends, a reimagined take on the original 1999 EverQuest experience. Designed for solo and casual players, EQL features powerful multiclass characters, iconic races, classic zones, nostalgic visuals, and modern quality-of-life improvements. Legends begin here!

similarGames.name: Anima: Gate of Memories - The Nameless Chronicles

title: Strafest
summary: Strafest is a third-person co-op platformer full of physics-based minigames! Join friends in dodge boulders in volcanic pits or outrun bridge-blasting cannons. Unlock colorful Skins, Trails, and Titles to customize your character. It’s all about teamwork, goofy moments, and having a blast together!

title: FishPond
summary:
FishPond is a pond-building sim where biology actually compounds.

Stock species into a living food web. Manage oxygen, predation, and diversity to keep things alive—then start pushing the system. Breed lineages across 12 inheritable traits. Unlock genetic tools. Automate harvesting. Expand your world.

Every fish has AI-driven behavior, a real genome, and a place in the food chain. Every population shift changes the music in real time. Every upgrade makes the whole thing run a little more like a machine—until you realize the machine is alive.

title: DragonSword: Awakening
summary: Explore the anime-style open world of the Continent of Orbis, brought to life with Unreal Engine 5! Recruit unique companions, unleash spectacular Status Ailment tag-team action, and embark on an epic journey to save the world from the threat of a Dragon reawakened after 60 years.

title: Overdrive Reloaded
summary: Overdrive Reloaded is a single player first-person shooter created by Dynamite Games. Drop into a stunning reimagining of the series, built from the ground up with relentless PvE combat, action-packed Arena modes, open world Battle Royale, and an all-new progression system known as Evolution.

title: Rails & Rivals
summary: Rails & Rivals is a turn-based strategy board game in which 2-6 players build railroad networks on a hex grid, deliver colored goods between cities, and compete for the highest score. Players lay track tiles across terrain with varying costs, issue bonds for capital, upgrade their locomotive Engine, and industrialize gray towns into colored cities to create new delivery destinations. The game ends when a set number of cities are emptied, and the player with the most income track points wins.

title: Joy Malignant
summary: A visceral dice-based RPG in a cursed city of gut-wrenching suffering. Here, your past shapes your skills and your appearance. Survive the city's hellish trials, meet tortured characters, and develop your own unique identity. Every choice matters as your actions will literally shape you.

title: Mind Vessel
summary: An autobattler roguelite in which you are a Vessel formed by the unification of dead people's spirits. Dismember and graft them to customize their abilities, as you use them to find a way out of the void.

title: Stop and Smell the Flowers
summary: Relax in your shady garden and watch the flowers. Plant flowers, earn money, expand your garden, and trace the evolution chart to complete your collection.

title: Garden of Being
summary: Garden of Being is a handmade oil pastel art game and a quiet journal of moods. Plant flowers, dedicate gardens to loved ones, and create downloadable prints. A fusion of art and code where gardens come alive while you are in them, and wait silently when you leave.

title: Vivid Intrusion
summary: Survive as long as you can in this retro-styled movement shooter roguelike. Imbue your weapon with unique effects as you fight against a never-ending onslaught of enemies.

title: Orblins

Create game-breaking builds with endless marbles and upgrades to defeat a host of Orblins and bosses. Choose from a large cast of characters or create your own custom class to personalize your run.

title: Database Detective: Minor Crimes Division
summary: Solve criminal cases through the power of SQL queries! Help out the city of Los Zorangeles by becoming a Database Detective in this new (unpaid) work from home opportunity.

title: Question Roulette
summary: Prove your wits and composure in this ultimate fast-paced trivia challenge where knowledge, speed, and strategic risk-taking determine victory.

title: Would You Love Me If I Was a Snake?
summary: A puzzle game where you play as a snake. Push objects, block lasers, teleport, and bite your tail off to escape dreamy puzzle rooms.

title: Just Dying
summary: A 2D action Roguelite where you play streamer parodies and die on purpose. Unlock characters, stack relics, snowball into a screen-clearing menace, then watch it all collapse in 30 seconds. Learn. Die again.

title: Ore & Odds
summary:
Ore & Odds is an incremental game about extracting minerals and watching numbers spiral out of control. Every mineral you collect can be spent on upgrades or bet on the slot machine.

Your luck matters! Combine minerals and increase your chances of winning. Sometimes you win big. Sometimes… not so much.

title: Curio Shop
summary: Buy mysterious (possibly cursed) goods from the dark web by night, then sell them in your curio shop by day. Balance profit against consequence and assemble an artifact capable of causing the apocalypse. All in a day’s work.

title: Starry Station
summary: Adventure through a newly abandoned space station called "Starry Station", a station that once took children to space. Journey through this place to find a way to space while trying to find the reason for its closure with your new pal Cosmo Paw. Be careful some things in here do tend to bite.

title: Online: 404
summary: An open-world survival simulator where even seasoned veterans of the genre will have to rethink their typical survival approach and how they interact with the world around them. Play solo or with friends, follow the story or simply explore — just don’t forget your most important gadget.

title: Gearplexed
summary: Enjoy playing with gears? Gearplexed is a constructive problem-solving game with a variety of gear-based puzzles ranging from opening gates to building factories. Build gear trains to get the right amount of speed and torque to the target gears and be careful not to lock up your gear train.

title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Tyrant God
summary: Slay waves of monsters with your mouse, collect coins, buy permanent upgrades, and grow stronger round after round in a compact incremental action game.

title: Hold the Core
summary: Hold the Core is a roguelite tower defense game about trading safety for power. Draft Risk Cards, shape enemy routes, evolve towers, and survive deadly enemies and bosses.

title: Spacebolt
summary: What am I? Where am I? Who am I? Spacebolt is a narrative-driven puzzle adventure game where you control a spark of electricity. Traverse walls and ceilings, travel through circuits, and awaken dormant machines as each discovery brings you closer to the truth.

title: Psi-Ops: The Mindgate Conspiracy
summary: A port of Psi-Ops: The Mindgate Conspiracy, enhanced with up-rendering, rewind, quick save, and custom video filters.

title: Hyperwired
summary: Pilot a ship with a charger hanging. Explore an ever-changing space an plug to recharge your energy while surviving the enemy breach in this cable-like space shooter with roguelike elements and plugged resource management.

title: Rhythm Heaven Groove
summary: The rhythm is starting up again! Rhythm Heaven Groove comes to Nintendo Switch!

title: Under the Eye
summary: The world and regime you once knew is crumbling day by day. The Major won't let you go until you've beat her at her own twisted card game. Bid, cheat and bend the rules to see another day, or die and be forgotten.

title: Important People of History: Presidents - George Washington
summary:
Learn all about George Washington in this visual novel biography containing rare photos from inside the Washington Monument, Washington's home at Mount Vernon, Yorktown where he achieved final victory in the Revolutionary War, and much more. Soldier, General, Spymaster, and President - this is George Washington!

Part of the Important People of History series:
1. George Washington
2. Thomas Jefferson
3. Abraham Lincoln

All three games about US Presidents releasing in 2026 to commemorate the 250th anniversary of the signing of the Declaration of Independence back in 1776

Proudly made in Washington’s home state of Virginia

title: The Glory Dungeon Raider

title: The Moment of Panic
summary: Trapped in an underground bunker with your finger on the button, interpret intelligence signals, question unreliable AI advisors, and decide whether to escalate, stand down, or unleash doomsday.

title: Commutator
summary: Commutator is an instrument-only horror game set in a dystopian future where human perception is replaced by sensors and code. You are an operator sitting behind a terminal, guiding a remote unit through the darkness.

title: NightMaze
summary: What started as a simple urbex quickly turns into a nightmare: locked sewers, a trapped castle, a ruined village, and a procedural maze swarming with zombies. In co-op, search, loot, dodge, and survive together—before the undead find you first.

As invaders push deeper into the untamed woods, the witch Cuca merely watches their movement, waiting for the perfect moment to strike.

summary: Operation Obliteration 2 is an old-school FPS stripped to the bone. Play any level in any order. Cut scenes are cut. Filler removed. No hand-holding. No safe spaces. Fight through a brutal alternate-history WWII campaign where aggression is survival and hesitation means death. Play the campaign straight through—or drop into any mission instantly. Nothing hidden or locked and every level available. All levels can be finished, your are given the resources, find them and use them correctly! Improvise, adapt and overcome!

title: Moonlight Peaks
summary: Live the vampire life in the magical town of Moonlight Peaks! Master the art of potions and spells, manage your supernatural farm, and leave your mark on the magical town. Make friends with the local werewolves, witches, and mermaids, and find your eternal love in the supernatural dating scene.

title: Kings & Savages
summary: A skill based auto battler. Easy to learn, hard to master. Little time commitment as games last a minute. Inspired by Chess and Dota.

title: Elderwood Online
summary: Dive back into the essence of MMORPGs with Elderwood Online, where we pay homage to the beloved classics of the late '90s and early 2000s, infused with a touch of today's innovation. Elderwood Online marries the nostalgia of golden-age MMOs with fresh adventures and discoveries.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced
summary: The iconic solo pirate adventure returns with Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced, launching on July 9, 2026. Sail the Caribbean as Edward Kenway during the Golden Age of Piracy in this faithfully enhanced remake featuring stunning visuals, upgraded gameplay, and new content.

title: Granblue Fantasy: Relink - Endless Ragnarok
summary: Known for its dynamic combat, ensemble of versatile characters, and thrilling online cooperative play, Relink returns with expanded solo and multiplayer content, bringing endless adventure to skyfarers both new and old.

summary: The apeX of 2D action, the Luminous Avenger iX series, complete and refined. With all DLC and new balance updates, both games reach their peak. Plus an all-new "Endless Battle" mode. This special update is perfect for new and returning players alike.

title: Backyard Baseball
summary: A New Backyard Baseball game is launching in Summer 2026. The timeless classic is leveling up with all-new game modes, new ways to play, brand-new features and more. It’s the game you love, reimagined for a whole new era. Get ready for Backyard Baseball like you've never experienced it before.

title: Veritas Tales: Witch of the Dark Castle
summary: A neo-classic digital gamebook RPG that reimagines the charm of classic gamebooks for the modern age. Experience the nostalgic feel of scribbling stats with a pencil, rolling dice to decide your fate, and flipping pages by hand. The "authentic fantasy" you crave is right here!

title: My Cozy Workspace
summary: Build the workspace you’ve always dreamed of!

title: Machinefall
summary: Machinefall is a post-apocalyptic real time strategy game set on a fully playable global map. Lead humanity’s last survivors as they build bases, gather resources, and wage massive battles against an overwhelming machine swarm. Progress through technological eras from Stone Age to Atomic Age.

title: Insanio
summary: Autobattler where you send misfits into vehicular combat. Your job is to prepare them, deploy them, watch them struggle and finally watch them die or win in massive explosions.

summary:
Step into the legendary floating castle of Aincrad, a realm of breathtaking beauty and unforgiving danger. What seemed to be a dream adventure has now become a fight for survival. Among thousands of trapped souls, your journey is yours alone; will you rise, endure, and forge bonds that define your destiny? Or will you perish while facing enemies stronger, faster, and more ruthless than you imagined?

This is not just a game. It’s a battle for survival.

summary: A game about thinking about ships.

title: Uchi No Heya!
summary: Run a sumo stable! Recruit rookies, drill their stats, cook chanko nabe, and steer them through six grand tournaments a year. Climb the banzuke from Jonokuchi to Yokozuna while juggling injuries, rivalries, and an empty bank account. Work hard to make your heya legendary!

title: Soothe
summary: You awaken at the bottom of a rusted pit, another forgotten machine amongst a pile of those who came before. On your right, an extendable grappling claw, and on your left, a melted screen. You are given only one goal - reach the light above.

title: Ascend to Zero
summary: Have you ever wondered what it's like to stop the time? Ascend to ZERO is a time-control roguelike, in which you can use your special ability to stop the time itself and efficiently fight your way through the top. Freeze the time to dodge opponents' attacks using your unique ability, and always hold a higher ground for the combat. However, don't forget that the time allowed for you is confined.

title: Mysarium
summary: A cozy sandbox designed to accompany you as you go about your day. Take a break: relax, breathe, and create tiny worlds in glass. Grow plants, unlock new elements, and find secret combinations to summon special guests to photograph.

title: Sandwich +1
summary: A cozy idle clicker where every click drops a random ingredient with a satisfying plop. Stack towering sandwiches, automate your kitchen, unlock rare fillings. Your customers watch every move and react.

title: Difficult
summary: Step into a fully 3D medieval world of deception. diffiCULT is a multiplayer social deduction game where you must uncover hidden cultists. Use proximity voice chat, investigate houses at night, survive daily votes, and reveal who is truly on your side.

title: Ledgerbound

title: D-topia
