title: Something to Drink?
summary: I'm Tom and I just got a job as a bartender. Now I have to wipe down the same sticky counters where I used to leave my own marks. In this dive, even the rats look like they're hungover. Alright, the boozers won't pour their own drinks - time to get back to work.

title: The Mound: Omen of Cthulhu
summary: In up to four player co-op, form a group of explorers searching for treasure. In this cursed jungle, danger is everywhere and monstrous creatures alter reality. Stay clear-headed and tame the jungle before it devours you…

title: Tower Command
summary: Strategic tower defense where you need to maximize your bonuses. Create your build, upgrade towers, link them, equip items to create ridiculous combos. Placement is key in this game, you decide the path enemies take to their goal. Explore all maps and unlock towers, commanders, traits and items.

title: Push and Pull
summary: The Push and Pull is a co-op only puzzle platformer about playing as two dualistic bunnies.

title: Kyoto Xanadu: The Blooming Phantom
summary: Set in an alternate reality where Kyoto is the capital of Japan, Kyoto Xanadu players take on monsters and mysteries coming from the great labyrinth known as Xanadu. As a student, players will challenge the labyrinth and grow through their battles within Xanadu while also deepening bonds with various people during your daily life. Uncover the truth hidden both in the labyrinth and Kyoto itself.
alternativeNames: 亰都ザナドゥ -桜花幻舞-

similarGames.name: Nights of Azure 2: Bride of the New Moon

title: Culdcept Begins
summary:
Led by dice. Ruled by cards.

A hidden classic that fuses board and card games, Culdcept features a unique, innovative system that has captivated fans since its debut. Players become Cepters, wielding cards in intense battles where luck and strategy collide. After ten years, a brand-new story begins once again.
alternativeNames: カルドセプト ビギンズ

title: 70s-style Robot Anime Geppy-X
summary:
Originally released exclusively in Japan in 1999, 70s-style Robot Anime Geppy-X became one of the most outrageous and ambitious anime shooters of the CD-ROM era.

Built at the height of the late-90s CD-ROM boom, the original PlayStation release spanned four discs and featured over 8,000 hand-drawn animation frames, truly an unprecedented production scale for a 2D shooter.

This wasn’t just a game inspired by anime—it was a full-blown 70s super robot TV series you could play!
alternativeNames: '70年代風ロボットアニメ ゲッP−X

title: Instant Sports 2
summary: Instant Sports 2 delivers fast-paced, easy-to-pick-up gameplay with depth for players looking to master each discipline.

title: Kooo to Jump!
summary: A hardcore, voice-controlled precision platformer where you crow to jump! Sustain a continuous 'KOOO' to scale a brutal, foddian-style map. Scale 60 camera zones, conquer a massive world, and lose your dignity in this unrelenting rage game. Includes controller support and Practice Mode.

title: Take Me To The Dungeon!!
summary: Build your deck and take Una on an epic dungeon adventure!

title: Slime Alchemy
summary: Slime Alchemy is a relaxing puzzle game where you must place pieces in specific locations on a hexagonal grid.

title: Love is a Demon
summary: Love is a Demon is an adventure game packed with romance, chaos, and supernatural surprises. Confess your crush, dodge demons, and embrace the mess; love has never been this complicated. Your choices shape Ash’s love life in this heartfelt, hilarious story-driven experience.

title: Malware Tycoon
summary: Step back to the era of dial-up and WinGoals SP. As a black-hat developer, manage the delicate balance of detection probability versus payout potential. Will you build a silent botnet for profit or a worm designed to destroy? Avoid the feds and conquer the web in this nostalgic management sim.

title: Our Brief Eternity
summary: In the visual novel "Eternity, Stars, and Everyday Life," you are Lin Xiaocou, an ordinary office worker whose life is turned upside down when two girls from another world unexpectedly move in. Amidst the light-hearted and joyful daily routines, can you discover a unique happiness for everyone?

title: DDD: Demons Double Down
summary: Sometimes loneliness pushes us into strange, risky choices. A nightclub that wasn’t here yesterday. Mysterious strangers—each leaving more questions than answers. Just one short night that simply won’t end. What could possibly go wrong?

title: Leap Of Faith
summary:
Unlimited local multiplayer chaos! Connect infinite controllers & phones, control wobbly giraffes, dodge physics-based obstacles, and fight to reach the rocket ship first. The more players, the more chaos!

Side scroller platformer, a race to the finish!

title: Expandaball
summary: Expandaball is a physics-based marble platformer inspired by Super Monkey Ball and Katamari Damacy, where collecting bamboo makes the panda’s ball grow larger, heavier and faster, unlocking new paths and challenges.

title: Wild West Survivors
summary: Survive the frontier. Hunt the undead.

title: Iron Colony
summary: After crash-landing on a mysterious island, confront hostile robotic creatures in intense combat and strategic duels. Explore forgotten ruins, uncover secrets, and fight for survival in a world where corrupted technology dominates every corner.

title: Demon With a Candy Crisis
summary: A quick and easy 3d platformer playing as a demon that needs to quench its thirst for candy. Travel through hell to get to the surface to find someone's secret stash of candy.

title: Dewdrop Dynasty
summary: Run, dash, and crawl your way through a fast, Metroidvania. Battle with giant bosses, find new guns and abilities, meet quirky characters, and most importantly find your way home.

title: Pit Panic
summary: Escape the sinking Aztec temple in this cartoonish rogue-like arcade platformer. Dig your own path up, jump and climb in blazing speed, hoard loot, trade lives for god-like powers, beat bosses, master 1000 handmade levels and humble other players in daily leaderboards.

title: Broken Reality 2000
summary: The sequel to everyone's favorite single-player adventure set on the internet about our digital lives.

title: Lifted
summary:
Step into the Anytime Elevator and get LIFTED — a cinematic single-player 2.5D puzzle-platform adventure from a former Disney ride designer.

Slacker Ari Buktu only pokes his head into Professor Raventhorpe’s lab for extra credit; seconds later he’s hurtling through history on a reckless mission to steal a legendary tiara and fix the professor’s love-life. Each stop opens a new era, a bigger puzzle, and the shadow of a rival tomb-raider who’s always one jump behind…
alternativeNames: Ari Buktu and the Anytime Elevator

title: Brazzante
summary: Featuring a unique doodle aesthetic, this world is entirely hand-drawn. Your goal? Use classic 'Rock, Paper, Scissors' mechanics to survive never-ending rounds.

title: Theropods
summary: Face dinosaurs, solve puzzles and travel back to the time of ginormous lizards and pixelated adventure games.

title: Gurei
summary: An action platformer where you face challenging enemies inspired by Japanese mythology and acquire their powers. Choose your fights in any order, knowing that each opponent gets stronger as the game progresses!

title: High Times
summary: Sit back and relax as you play the role of a donut therapist in this cozy dating/cooking sim. Feeling nervous? Need some happiness in your life? Here at High Times, there's a donut for every mood.

title: Rubinite
summary: "Rubinite" is a dark fantasy boss rush action game that utilizes the unique mechanic "Focus" to pinpoint enemies' weaknesses and execute thrust attacks. Follow Ruby, a princess who has escaped from the Scarlet Kingdom, embarking on a journey of revenge to reclaim her kingdom.

title: Helix: Descent N Ascent
summary: Helix is an adventure game taking place in a melancholic disembodied world. Combine your powers to solve puzzles and explore further and deeper.

title: Dodo Duckie
summary: Aliens abducted your chicken friends! Play as Dodo, a brave but slightly clueless duck on a mission to bring them home. The twist? Swap between 2D and 3D perspectives INSTANTLY to solve platforming puzzles and explore a cozy, charming world full of surprises.. like a capybara that sells caps.

title: Staffer Retro
summary: Staffer Retro is a mystery adventure game where you uncover past incidents related to ‘Mana’, the source of supernatural powers. Gather information through dialogue and exploration, and piece together clues found in documents to guide the choices of Verita Retro, the protagonist.
alternativeNames: Staffer Retro : A Supernatural Mystery Quest

title: Find My Frogs: Branches
summary: Find My Frogs: Branches is a cozy hidden object game where you search for frogs and toads in a hand-drawn village nestled high in the branches of an ancient tree. Explore charming corners, discover tiny secrets, and help Uncle Froger find his missing hat.

title: Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game
summary: Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game is a fast-paced 1v1 fighter where you battle as your favorite characters from the Avatar franchise. Featuring hand-drawn 2D animation true to the series’ roots, proprietary rollback netcode, and full cross-play for smooth, competitive gameplay.

similarGames.name: Anima: Gate of Memories - The Nameless Chronicles

title: Maze Nightmare: Edge of Darkness
summary: Maze Nightmare-Edge of Darkness is a first-person survival game. Trapped in a foggy, procedural maze, use limited ammo and faint breath sounds to locate the key-carrying zombie, find the key, and escape—or be lost forever.

title: Dithered
summary: Dithered invites you to a realm forsaken by the clock—a surreal nightmare where you must platform through the jagged shards of a protagonist's trauma. Guided by two bickering birds and hunted by a ticking horror, you must fight your way through a glitching reality…

title: The Deepest Castle
summary: You are a mighty knight - how powerful your blows are! And in the very center of a vast forest lies a fortress filled with evil and black magic. There, they raise the dead and hide great artifacts. You decide to explore the fortress and see what the black magicians are hiding.

title: Micronova
summary: In this vast universe, you are a Novi-01, a tiny explorer who jumps, climbs, and carves their way through levels filled with creatures and environments that react to your every move, waiting to be explored and solved in order to advance.

title: Hovertron
summary: Hoverboard your way through a physics-based platformer. Easy to learn but hard to master; Flow and flip through a series of levels to chase perfect runs. Compete on a global scoreboard, or hunt down the secrets hidden throughout the game.

title: Go North
summary: Wander a world filled with cleverly-crafted mazes. Whoever can solve them all gets their wish granted by the Maze God. Explore beautiful mazes, discover unique items and help other maze explorers complete unusual side quests in this cozy and immersive maze adventure!

title: Zwamman
summary: Zwamman is a zero pressure single screen puzzle game in which you have to use your light to help Zwamman find crystals in dark forests and swamps. Use the crystals to light a path to Zwamman's home and reveal the true nature of the scary monsters!

title: Incremental Retro Racing
summary: Earn more and more stars by driving faster and faster in Incremental Retro Racing. Accumulate and unlock 70+ vehicles, upgrades, track generation options, and more. Includes unlimited tracks and customizable CRT filter for that old school retro feel.

title: Bloodwright
summary: Descend through deadly procedural dungeons, claim powerful loot, and decide how deep you're willing to risk it all in this dark fantasy action RPG roguelite.

title: Truck-Kun Is Supporting Me From Another World?!
summary: Your truck is magic and you now owe a soul debt to the buff isekai elf girl living in your head. Run over pedestrians as Truck-kun, make deliveries, and defeat the Skeleton King across two worlds in this chaotic run-based anime driving game!
alternativeNames: Truck-kun is Supporting Me from Another World?!

title: BloodRayne: Definitive Collection
summary:
Become Rayne, a half-human, half-vampire agent working for the Brimstone Society, as she hunts supernatural threats across a dark and violent world. From battling occult forces tied to the Third Reich to confronting her own vampiric bloodline, Rayne’s journey spans brutal conflicts, relentless enemies, and deeply personal vendettas.

This collection includes the original BloodRayne, BloodRayne 2, and BloodRayne: Betrayal – Fresh Bites, combining fast-paced third-person action with stylish 2D hack-and-slash gameplay. Face hordes of soldiers, grotesque creatures, and powerful bosses using Rayne’s acrobatic combat skills, brutal melee attacks, and vampiric abilities.

Enhanced for modern platforms, this definitive edition delivers the ultimate way to experience the full BloodRayne saga — a cult classic series known for its unique blend of action, horror, and gothic style.

title: Kusan: City of Wolves
summary: Kusan: City of Wolves is a high-octane hardcore top-down shooter where players fight through a brutal urban jungle ruled by gunfire and corruption to save Haru — a girl fitted with a city-grade atomic weapon.

title: Truxton Extreme
summary: Truxton Extreme, which inherits the DNA from legendary arcade masterpiece Truxton, is a collaboration with manga artist and Toaplan alumni Junya Inoue.

title: Signy & Mino: Against All Gods
summary: Signy & Mino: Against All Gods is a new kind of combo RPG where you and your pup piece together flashy combos to dismantle a plethora of enemies! Discover your hidden powers as you find yourself hurtled into a conflict amongst the gods.

similarGames.name: Nights of Azure 2: Bride of the New Moon

title: Rita
summary: Rita is a cozy adventure where a little chicklet solves word-based puzzles to transform the world around her. Follow her story across generations, meet her grandchicklet, and be a part of her legacy.

title: Village in the Shade
summary: Enjoy quiet, countryside living in a Japanese village in this brand new farming sim! Just make sure you follow the rules—or else!

title: How Many Dudes?
summary: How many dudes does it take to beat up 1000 toddlers? A gorilla? Twelve bears and a horse-sized duck? A GOD? Enter the Dude Ranch and find out.

title: Seifuku Kanojo 2: Free DLC Act.4 - Konomi Yui
summary: The fourth and final free DLC for Seifuku Kanojo 2, focused on Yui.

title: Culdcept The First Saturn Tribute
summary:
The Culdcept series has captivated players worldwide. Now, the original masterpiece returns, enhanced with convenient new features.

Build your deck from over 300 types of cards and witness the dawn of a new battle among Cepter.
alternativeNames: カルドセプト ザ ファースト

title: The Prince of Tennis: Sweet School Festival 0-40 and more…
summary: Originally released on PlayStation 2, the Prince of Tennis game where you play as a high school student preparing for the school festival is being remastered in celebration of its 20th anniversary.

title: Ghost Master: Resurrection - Solid Ice and Terror
Blue Reflection Quartet
summary: Cosmos converge, into one light. The emotional stories of magical Reflectors and the bonds they form. The entire BLUE REFLECTION series combined into one!

title: Blue Reflection Ray
summary:
A condensed game adaptation of the Blue Reflection Ray's anime included in the Blue Reflection Quartet bundle.

Follow Hiori and Ruka as they explore the Common while re-experiencing their memories on their way to confront a girl trying to recreate the world. New short stories expand on the anime’s story, and a new prologue and epilogue connect this entry to the other works in the series.

title: Blue Reflection Sun
summary:
An offline remake of the Blue Reflection Sun gacha game inclunded in the Blue Reflection Quartet bundle.
It has been remade as a console game using the systems of Blue Reflection: Second Light to recreate the memorable battles of the original game. 24 new character events have been added alongside the main story.

title: Blue Reflection
summary:
A remaster of the first Blue Reflection game included in the Blue Reflection Quartet bundle.
Textures and character models have been updated to high resolution versions, and new visual effects such as glistening water add to the world’s atmosphere. New quality of life features such as autosave and increased movement speed have been included, offering a more enjoyable experience than ever before.

title: Blue Reflection: Second Light
summary: A new release of Second Light included in the Blue Reflection quartet bundle. This release features eight additional characters from Ray and Sun who can join you in battle, as well as new quality of life features such as increased battle speed, faster movement speed while exploring, and event fast-forwarding.

title: Seventh Mansion: The First Escape
summary: Escape an eerie mansion where death resets everything. Solve puzzles, evade the Wicked Nuns, or use a camera to survive in this psychological horror experience.

title: Pixel Empires
summary: Pixel Empires is a pixel-art real-time strategy game where you build and manage medieval colonies, automate resource gathering with intuitive AI, explore uncharted lands, and wage tactical battles to expand your empire’s reach.

title: Paw Patrol: Dino World
summary: Join the PAW Patrol and Rex on colossal missions across Dino Island. Create roar-some looks, play minigames with friends and more.

title: Corsair Cove
summary: Build a sprawling pirate haven, raise a fleet to explore the high seas, and take on the Crown to keep the Age of Piracy alive! From ale to flintlock pistols, and from scallywags to swashbucklers, you’ll need to manage complex production chains and govern a rowdy crew to reign supreme over the seas!

similarGames.name: Order of Battle: World War II

title: Appalachian Onslaught
summary: Build, upgrade and defend against an endless onslaught of cryptids being sent to destroy your tribe by the great Appalachian nightmare himself... the Rketari.

title: The Witch's Bakery
summary:
The Witch’s Bakery is a 2D Adventure Puzzle game where you play as a joyful witch who opens a bakery in modern Paris.

She has a special power: she can heal emotions with her bread.

title: Silly Suspects
summary:
Silly Suspects is comical, Guess-Who detective mystery where you investigate ridiculous crimes in a weird, wacky, and whimsical world, and uncover the truth hiding beneath all the nonsense.

Win over quirky characters by indulging their odd requests and solve bizarre puzzles to uncover clues they wouldn’t share with just anyone. Use deduction to rule out suspects one clue at a time until only one remains. Each case is its own absurd mystery, fresh faces, new places, and a new mess to untangle.

title: Purgatory: Blue
summary:
A new visual novel led, written and composed by cittan*.

Akito meets his childhood friend, but for some reason, he is the only one who can see and recognize her.

title: Creepy Support
summary: Save people from terrible paranormal dangers as a support operator of a secret SCP-like organization! Ask questions, give advice and watch the consequences of your choices... 5+ endings in each story ;-)

title: Teeko
summary: Platformer meets tower defense in this story-rich game inspired by the Costa Rican Día de Las Mascaradas festival. One day, grandma Tita's kids get possessed by the spirits of the gigantes and begin to wreak havoc upon the land. It's now up to her pet sloth, Teeko, to save their town.

title: Underside: The Lift
summary: A single-player survival roguelike horror game with randomly generated locations and permanent death. A mysterious labyrinth of post-Soviet apartments draws you into an atmosphere of solitude and plunges you into the darkness of the unknown.

title: Cult of Pin
summary: Flip, nudge, and destroy in this roguelike pinball deckbuilder. Select from 100+ upgrades to create game-breaking builds and smash through the cursed playfields. Complete missions to trigger explosive special attacks and tear the tables apart, one bumper at a time.

title: Touhou Chronicle of Youkai Prayers
summary: A fan-made roguelike action Touhou game. Due to a Kedama incident in Gensokyo, Flandre Scarlet eagerly takes the initiative to resolve it. Or rather, she's actually just causing chaos, definitely not trying to solve anything!

title: Pieces of the Kingdom
summary: What if Chess…was a roguelite? Assemble your party and battle your way across a broken kingdom in a fantastical, tactical take on Chess. Loot epic gear, recruit powerful pieces with unique abilities, and strategize your way to victory.

title: Sovereign Tower
summary: Play as the Sovereign of a magical tower in this story-rich, Round Table management RPG. Recruit eccentric Knights, assign quests and balance egos whilst carving out your kingdom's destiny. If destiny doesn’t go your way, keep turning back time, uncover secrets and rewrite fate again and again.

title: Ranchbound
summary: Ranchbound is a western-themed real-time strategy and management game focused on running and expanding a ranch. Players manage cowboys and livestock, assign workers to tasks, transport cattle between locations, and make economic decisions to keep the ranch profitable and alive. The game combines strategic planning, light survival elements, and a stylized depiction of life in the Wild West.

title: Oradea
summary: A hexagonal rhythm game played on a controller or touchscreen.

title: I.T Never Ends
summary: The printer is bleeding, the Wi-Fi is haunted, and Ticket #666 just came in. As the latest hire for a company run by cosmic horrors, your job is simple: Swipe to survive. Make binary decisions to survive the night shift in this dark comedy desktop simulator. I.T truly never ends.

title: Hoshizora he Tatsu Hi
summary: ────On that day, the girl rewove the fabric of the world. A Mystic Suspense Visual Novel.

title: Elemental Witches
summary: In Elemental Witches world, you command Fire, Wind, and Thunder to craft unique spells from three elemental orbs. Merge identical elements to summon powerful pets. After each battle, upgrade elements, unlock items, and shape your own playstyle as you face new adventures.

similarGames.name: Auto Statue Battle: The Forces of Evil

title: Shell of the Coward
summary: Shell of the Coward is a turn-based roguelike/RPG where you must escort the Anathema you've sworn to protect through a perilous dungeon without ever looking back.

title: The Comyths
summary: Stop, slow, and rewind time in a bullet-hell action game. The Comyths is a reality-bending character-driven game where you wield the fundamental forces of Space, Time, Matter, Life, Mind, and Void. Chase S-ranks, unlock art rewards, and uncover story logs.

title: The Sorting Bureau
summary: A cozy sorting game set in a quiet Tokyo workshop. Clients bring you boxes of clutter: buttons, coins, gears, stamps. Sort, match, and piece everything together with satisfying ASMR clicks. No timers. No wrong answers. Just the joy of tidying up.
alternativeNames: 整理工坊 The Sorting Bureau
整理工坊 The Sorting Bureau

title: Kurohi
summary:
Explore interconnected areas, uncover hidden secrets, and unlock powerful abilities as you fight your way through deranged bosses and discover a mysterious world filled with danger, lore, and unexpected twists.

Kurohi combines tight platforming, overhead exploration, and arcade-style space shooter gameplay, creating a dynamic adventure that shifts between multiple styles of play. This represents an era of passion for retro gaming, pixel art, and authentic handheld development.

title: How to Kill a Fly
summary: Witness how the actions of an "individual" can serve the pinnacle of a system. Pose as a "human". Serve it as its limited drone model. Accomplish your assignment.

title: All You Can Fish!
summary: All You Can Fish is an active, relaxing incremental fishing adventure where every voyage matters, every upgrade counts, and every fish brings you one step closer to maritime legend.

title: Time Shock
summary: Rip through fractured timelines fighting robots, drones and bosses. Rank up as different characters with special abilities. Upgrade weaponized vehicles with future technology. Timelines favor the AI army. Will you tip the balance?

title: Last Floor
summary:
Last Floor is a first-person psychological horror game focused on observation and anomaly detection. The player navigates a looping hospital corridor and must identify subtle changes in the environment.

Each run begins in an elevator and progresses through an identical hallway. The player must determine whether an anomaly is present during the loop and choose the correct elevator direction to continue. Incorrect decisions reset progression.

title: Pilgrim Alliance
summary: PILGRIM ALLIANCE is a "Journey to the West" survivor rogue-lite. Lead your team through the "81 Tribulations" to reach India. Defeat and recruit Demon Kings to your squad! Mix teammates to create diverse builds, break through enemy swarms to defeat bosses, and craft your own legendary pilgrimage.

title: Lucky Shot
summary: The flick-shot roguelite FPS. Sharpen your aim, master different weapons, and break the game to reach massive high scores.

title: Crown of Hispania
summary: Rewrite the Reconquista in a grand strategy game where population, religion, and war evolve dynamically based on your decisions. Will you become a legendary ruler, or will you be rejected by those forgotten by History?

title: Blacktower
summary: Blacktower is a roguelike mini-RPG loosely based on Blackjack. Recruit your party, gather your strength and push your luck to conquer the monstrous denizens of the tower.

title: Onimusha: Dawn of Dreams
summary: A port of Onimusha: Dawn of Dreams, enhanced with up-rendering, rewind, quick save, and custom video filters.

title: Anomaly President
summary: In this presidential rogue-like action game, gather votes and run for presidency by day, then transform into a warrior to take down your enemies by night! Master unique skills to become a swordmaster, a cyber mage, or anything in between, and overthrow the ruthless president!

title: Northern Waters: Fishing & Restaurant Simulator
summary: Run your own restaurant in the snowy Alaskan town of Northpointis Bay and experience an immersive fishing and restaurant simulator. Catch fish in first-person, manage your restaurant, cook and sell your catch, and become the town’s top angler and restaurateur.

title: Bros of Bench
summary: Bros of Bench is a chaotic co-op platformer where two players form a dumbbell connected by an adjustable bar. Alternate between lifting each other and flying with jetpacks while mastering coordination, physics, and timing.

title: Beast of Reincarnation
summary: In post-apocalyptic Japan, humanity’s last hope may rest with Emma and her loyal canine companion, Koo. Explore what it means to be human in Beast of Reincarnation, an expansive one-person, one-dog action RPG built around demanding, technical combat. What awaits at journey’s end?

title: Nature Minds
summary:
Nature Minds is an action-adventure RPG where you play as Tareq, a young warrior chosen by the ancient Bracelet of Dilmun. As nature falters and forgotten realms awaken, Tareq discovers that the force behind the world’s disturbance is Gilgamesh—the immortal king who gained endless life through the Plant of Immortality and now seeks to reshape creation according to his vision.

Travel across vast deserts, sunken kingdoms, radiant jungles, and sky cities as you uncover the truth behind the Bracelet of Dilmun and Gilgamesh’s transformation. Along your journey, you will ride the legendary Phoenix, born from the Three Impossible Legends of Arabic culture, and unlock ancient powers that guide you toward your final confrontation with the immortal king.

title: Jar Head Cauldron
summary: Fight monsters from the other side using magical items and weapons crafted in world in order to succeed. Use “In World Crafting” to upgrade weapons and solve puzzles in order to help save your dismembered brothers and sisters by completing the necromantic ritual before their souls are lost forever.

title: Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls
summary:
Assemble your team of legendary Marvel characters in the ultimate 4v4 tag team fighter from PlayStation Studios, Arc System Works and Marvel Games.
Immerse yourself in the Marvel universe like never before with an iconic roster of heroes and villains, authentic stages, and intuitive gameplay mechanics. Experience the thrill of fast-paced over the top action with stunning anime-inspired visuals, where every battle is a unique and exciting team VS battle experience.

similarGames.name: Anima: Gate of Memories - The Nameless Chronicles
Marvel Ultimate Alliance 3: The Black Order

title: JKRobots
summary: A real time strategy game, push the robots off the map to win, but they push back.

title: Backpack Boy
summary: Backpack Boy is off on one of his treks when he discovers a peculiar flashlight that changes the world around him. Explore a seemingly abandoned structure in this puzzle platformer built around mode-swapping.

title: Project Looking Glass
summary: 1963. A classified experiment. A grieving mother. A signal that won't stop transmitting. Step through the Looking Glass — a first-person psychological horror told through the static of a Cold War-era apparatus that peers into places mankind was never meant to reach.

title: Academy: Become a Hero
summary: Time-based challenges, precise jumps, and special abilities in an immersive academy to become the next hero.

title: Sunder Siege
summary: A short incremental physics game. Swing a wrecking ball to smash monsters before they reach your home! Upgrade your ball and your home for more smashy goodness!

title: G.O.D. Global Orbital Defense
summary: Take control of the G.O.D. system, the U.P.A.’s tactical satellite. Orbiting in silence above Vel’Aris, your mission is to protect the planet from every threat. Manage orbital fire. But remember: G.O.D. sees everything... even what you wish remained buried.

title: Wild Blue Skies
summary: Wild Blue Skies reimagines the classic on-rail adventures of the '90s. Join Bowie Stray and the Blue Bombers as they soar through the skies on a mission to save the world in this action-packed, nostalgic journey!

title: Hell Let Loose: Vietnam

Paperhead's Main Features

- Cardboard cute style with a horror twist. Cute but horrifying!

- Brutal and fast-paced combat. Slide to throw enemies in the air, kick explosive barrels into them (or enemies themselves!), and jump onto them Mario-style.

- Use a Pencil as a weapon. Draw a bomb to explode enemies!

- Use a Pencil as a reality-warping puzzle-solving tool. Not sure how to get through? Try to draw a door on the wall!

WHY WOULD PAPER...BLEED?

summary: You play as Reila Mikazuchi; a washed out mercenary whose glory days are long gone. In a last attempt at grabbing life by the horns, she decides to go back to the life, only to realize the real enemy isn’t in front of her gun.
alternativeNames: .45 PARABELLUM BLOODHOUND - Cyberpunk Active Time Action

title: Zodiac Mountain
summary: "Zodiac Mountain" is a roguelike deckbuilder following the journey of a Panda as they adventure to become a Chinese Zodiac. Utilise dual hands of Yin & Yang, encounter fierce mythical characters, outskill your enemies in battle, and climb Zodiac Mountain.

title: Footsy
summary: Footsy is a chaotic multiplayer soccer party game set inside grandma's house! Smash furniture, shatter bottles, and tumble TVs as you compete in wild, goal-scoring action. Customize your characters, challenge your friends, and embrace the crazy destruction in every room!

title: Tower Lab
summary: Roguelite tower defense where enemies can’t be killed, knock them off with physics instead! Build devastating contraptions that push, pull, and launch enemies. Unlock towers, discover broken synergies, and dominate through creative combinations.

title: Sick Samurai
summary: Sick Samurai is a blindingly fast and bloody action game based on instant-death combat. Immerse yourself in lofi hip hop and retro anime aesthetics as you slash and dash your way to becoming the greatest fighter on the island.

title: Pao Pao
summary: Pao Pao is a wild mix of culinary diving and animal madness—where you become the ultimate restaurant boss and management guru! Gather ingredients, go fishing, and expand your spot solo or with friends. Every order turns into an epic adventure… Jump in and experience it for yourself!

title: Sagas of Lumin
summary: Sagas of Lumin is a single-player action RPG featuring dragon flight that feels alive with full movement and combat control. Switch between aerial battles and ground combat using melee weapons, spells, and firearms. Your choices shape a deep, branching world.

title: Reality Drift
summary: Reality Drift is a roguelike racing game where your choices matter. Race through a series of strange worlds, choose upgrades for your car and decide which track will be next - your decisions are just as important as how you drive!

title: Deserter
summary: In this stealth RPG, you play as a deserter who is forced to become a thief in a grim, war-torn town. You'll have access to a rich arsenal of tools and devices: from lock picks and crowbars to grappling hooks and dynamite. Additionally, take advantage of your surroundings: find or create alternate routes, stick to the shadows, stay quiet, or use loud noises to cause distraction.

similarGames.name: Nights of Azure 2: Bride of the New Moon

title: Capy Castaway
summary: Embark on a whimsical adventure with a capybara pup and a clever crow as they set off to find their way home! Sniff, dig, and fly as you explore a vibrant world brimming with wonder, challenges, and heartwarming friendships at every turn.

title: Toem 2
summary: Step back into the shoes of a curious photographer and set off on a brand new adventure all about uncovering hidden details, helping friends along the way, and documenting the world’s little wonders in TOEM 2, the sequel to the acclaimed TOEM.

title: Medix
summary: How much can a person endure, and what is the true value of human life? In this minimalist real-time strategy game about war medics, you fight for your own survival and that of others while the army is under constant pressure, retreating from a superior enemy. A narrative campaign, accompanied by hand-drawn illustrations, takes you through the story of physicians pushed to their breaking point in their fight for a sliver of hope.

title: Looking For Fael
summary:
Upon receiving a cryptic voicemail from your missing roommate, the ordinary confines of your apartment transform into a surreal labyrinth. Guided by his voice and a custom retro console in hand, embark on a journey to decipher the mysteries that have twisted your home into an enigmatic maze.

But beware. The further you venture into other realities, the harder it will be to find your way back.

title: Cat Me If You Can
summary: Cat Me If You Can is a charming and cozy game where you explore beautifully handcrafted black-and-white worlds, searching for hidden cats to photograph and bring their colours back into the world.

title: A Forest Tale: Porasy
summary:
Embark on a journey through a new mythological realm as Porasy, an Indigenous warrior. Explore uncharted landscapes, unleash the power of Muiraquitãs, unravel your story, and vanquish the Seven Legendary Beasts to carve your own legend. Are you ready to dive into this epic adventure?

Porasy is an indie platformer that combines the thrill of classic 2D action with the rich, untold stories of the Tupi-Guarani mythology. Inspired by childhood favorites like Sonic and MegaMan, Porasy brings a fresh challenge to the platforming genre, immersing players in a dangerous, atmospheric world of Brazilian folklore.

title: Collapsed Horizon
summary: Travel between galaxies, dig planets, collect ores, sell them, upgrade your equipment, and earn your ticket back to Earth.

title: 100 Caliber Dash
summary: A high-speed run-and-gun shooter with roguelite deckbuilding upgrades.

title: Hats and Guns
summary: Become a cardslinger in this roguelike deckbuilder with tactical elements. Fight, gather weapons and items, face unexpected events and upgrade your cards for hundreds of possibilities. Every run is unique and so are you, the best shot of the Far West looking for your upcoming revenge.

similarGames.name: Order of Battle: World War II

title: Forsworn
summary: Step into a realm torn by divine conflict where every defeat is just another beginning in this rogue lite, turn-based tactics adventure where no hero fights alone. Build powerful synergies to overcome unforgiving battles and defy fate in a world controlled by the gods.

title: Aspiel: Edge of Chaos
summary: Aspiel: Edge of Chaos is a third-person fantasy Action-RPG. Explore numerous locations ravaged by the dark power of Death, face various creatures consumed by Chaos, and harness the power of Life to save the continent of Aspiel.

title: Lootbound
summary: Lootbound is a tactical loot management roguelike where you start solo and assemble your party as you go. Choose routes, risks, rewards, equip heroes and companions, and create a build to challenge the final boss. Turn-based combat, calculated risk, equipment synergies, and honest difficulty.

title: Ember & Blade
summary:
Become the immortal hunter and stand against the archdemon Asmodeus. Cut through bullet-hell swarms, clash with Souls-like bosses, and harness celestial blessings that
reshape your powers each run. The demons are rising—raise your sword.

title: The Blue Cut Hook
summary: The Blue Cut Hook blends cozy tavern management with subtle adventure. You're no hero, just a humble tavern keeper, but your food, gear, and advice quietly shape the adventurers who pass through. They make the choices, take the glory, and face the danger, but your influence might keeps them alive.

title: Take Them Down
summary: TAKE THEM DOWN is a fast-paced violent action game where you combine unique weapons and abilities to take down necromancers, demons, and betrayers while avoiding getting crushed and cleaved by traps, mines, and blades sprawled across nightmarish, macabre worlds. TAKE THEM DOWN.

title: Deep Pixel Melancholy
summary: Deep Pixel Melancholy is a visual novel about being stuck in a time loop inside a gray, soulless city. Unravel the mystery, and decide whether escaping is really worth it.

title: Homepage
summary: A horror anomaly finder where you are contracted to observe websites and report errors and changes. But there is more to your clients than meets the eye.

title: Fading Echo
summary: In Fading Echo, you rise as a young Legend to confront the Paradox before it consumes your world. Dive into this fast-paced action-adventure where you’ll travel across realities, battle fierce enemies, transform into a living water ball, and unleash devastating combos.

title: Spinning My Wheel
summary: Build a physics‑powered hamster‑wheel, master rocket‑boosted moves, to lead a brain chipped enhanced hamster through puzzles, mining, and laboratory‑runner mayhem.

title: GTL Schedule
summary: In a post-apocalyptic world where food has become contraband and hope is on the brink of extinction, you quietly ignite a revolution to warm the world with a spatula and love.

title: Tiny Delivery
summary: It’s a cozy adventure about a small delivery robot on a short but unforgettable journey. Deliver your package through a vibrant town, meet new people, stumble upon both funny and touching moments, discover hidden treasures, and soak in the world around you.

title: Archon Soul
summary: Roll the dice but make your own luck in this 2D dicebuilding roguelike. Customize your dice using swappable faces, runes, and bodies with unique effects. ​Draft spells, create powerful synergies, defeat challenging enemies, and conquer the Archon's palace.

similarGames.name: Three Kingdoms: Fate of the Dragon

title: Terrible Life Expectancy
summary: Terrible Life Expectancy is a roguelite top-down shooter with Survivors elements, where you fight absurd hordes of mutants for the amusement of an unseen bloodthirsty audience. You only inherit all your upgrades as long as someone in your family is still breathing… or at least twitching.

title: Nothing Strange Here
summary:
Nothing Strange Here is a single-player open-world adventure game with mystery and slice-of-life elements. Set in the small town of Larcenest Gap, players take on the role of a reporter exploring the community, documenting strange events, and interacting with townsfolk.

The game combines narrative discovery with photography and journaling mechanics. Players can photograph scenes, collect evidence, and publish their findings in a customizable in-game journal. NPCs follow daily routines, and the world changes based on the player's actions and the time of day. Additional features include hidden collectibles, such as stickers and gnomes, and dynamic events that encourage exploration and investigation.

title: Exofactory
summary: Awaken as a forgotten AI on an alien world, your every choice reshapes your technology, environment, and identity. Automate deeply transformative factories in a chill open world, where the story evolves uniquely around you.

title: Platonica Space
summary:
Open the door and step into someone's memories.
Platonica Space is a psychological exploration adventure where you search countless rooms to recover lost memories.

title: Cloudscrapers
summary:
Cloudscrapers is a minimalist strategy game with a relaxing atmosphere.

Start with simple tools and build the tallest tower you can. With each climb, you’ll improve, unlock upgrades, and reach new heights. As your tower rises, you’ll discover ancient relics and uncover secrets hidden deep within the clouds.

Designed for players who enjoy thoughtful gameplay without unnecessary complexity, the game blends replayable puzzle-strategy, meaningful progression, and a hand-drawn world you can get lost in.

title: DungeonBox
summary: A new Dungeons & Dragons Party Game! Let our Dungeon Master take you and up to 8 players on an adventure, where you control the next move by answering and voting from your phones

You can morph into a variety of characters! Embrace the chaos and deliver quality with your new intergalactic restaurant chain.

title: Arcaneering: Beyond Automation
summary: Build spell-powered factories, reclaim ancient territories filled with magical secrets, and discover game-changing technology hidden across procedurally generated worlds. Master both engineering and magic in this cozy fusion of factory automation and RPG progression.

title: Sketchy Driver
summary: An arcade, roguelike endless racer where you dodge traffic, jump ramps, perform tricks, earn points, and level up to make the run more entertaining, aiming for the best score. No story. No brakes. No problem.

title: Shutter Story
summary: Your friend is convinced his house is haunted. Examine his family's photo album to reveal signs of the paranormal, as the horror unfolds in the house around you. Their fate is in your hands.

title: Pigeon Guild
summary: Pigeon Guild is a non-combat, single-player action RPG where you play as Jules Corso, a rookie cadet in Cassandria's most prestigious airborne postal service. Navigate your flying cargo boat through a world of floating islands, where every delivery tells a story.

title: Project Octavia
summary: A stylized third-person spy action game with infiltration, gunplay, Close Quarter Combat (CQC) and innovative and dynamic sabotage gadget crafting with brand new science-fiction based stealth action multiplayer gameplay!

title: Economic Miracle

title: Gallipoli

title: He-Man and the Masters of the Universe: Dragon Pearl of Destruction

title: Echoes of Mora
summary: Embark on a mysterious journey, filled with intriguing interactions and meaningful encounters, as you explore a sunken village and travel through time to help Mora find her lost brother. Playable in VR and non-VR on PC.

title: FrogSpin
summary: A wind-up frogventure bursting with colorful platforming and roguelike surprises. Spin the slots, master precision jumps, and rack up points. Ready to leap into action?

title: Agecraft

The game combines settlement building, resource management, and technological progression. Players construct cities, manage the economy, provide for their people, and expand across different eras, unlocking new buildings, production chains, and methods of transportation as history advances.

similarGames.name: The Settlers: Rise of an Empire

title: Leafy Corner
summary: Run a cute little plant shop in this cozy shop management game. Grow, sell, and care for a variety of real-life plants, help customers find their dream plants, complete orders, and customize your cozy shop just the way you like!

title: Rat Game
summary: Asymmetrical horror comedy co-op for up to 8 players. Play either a pack of Rats trying to sabotage a restaurant, or the Chef determined to stop them.

title: Grail
summary: In this deckbuilder your deck fights for you. Upgrade, enchant and stickerize your cards to create clever cascading effects that defeat monsters and other players. Can you reach the Grail?

title: Micro Titans Wrestling

Then take a temporary trip to the afterlife and learn the stories of those who have passed. Experience moving between the living and spirit realms in this narrative-driven game.

title: Appa

title: Paradise Beyond the Nightmare

title: IPS 13: All Signals Lost

Be prepared for the worse and ready to fight. Upgrade your VOD, hire new crew factions, to be the ultimate War Machine.

title: Vampire: The Masquerade - Bloodlines 2 - The Flower & the Flame
summary:
Her art skirts the boundaries of life, of undeath, of Blood, and of the social mores of Kindred society. But she still burns for that glorious moment of transcendence, when her mastery will shape a work that echoes through eternity.

For this, she will become a legend. However, every masterpiece needs a canvas, and there is much work to be done.

Experience Ysabella's dark artistic journey as she seeks to create her magnum opus in this Story Pack.

Contains new playable story content, combat mechanics, and Phyre outfit.

similarGames.name: Nights of Azure 2: Bride of the New Moon

title: Tyr

Whether you tend it daily or let it flourish in idle mode, your goal is simple: create beauty worthy of a king.

Dear Poe is a spin-off of Dark Light, set 6 months before the main events of the game.

Starlet Voice

STARLET☆VOICE is a narrative talent-show survival sim set inside a 100-day televised competition. Train skills, build your persona, manage pressure, and form relationships as you navigate weekly episodes shaped by your choices. Public opinion, fan reactions, and on-air risks determine whether you rise in the rankings or fall into the elimination zone.
Featuring five heroines with unique storylines, multiple endings, and a blend of performance, strategy, and visual-novel drama.

title: Torii: Beyond The Gates
summary: The spirit realm has broken. Your brother has gone missing. Forge the path you were destined for. Explore the gates and find out why there has been broken links inside the spirit realm. Battle, discover and find the secrets, and make new connections in a beautiful hand-drawn 2D style.

title: Fortunato
summary: Draw a pair of aces, use them as poker hands or to eliminate your opponents? A poker roguelike battle card game. Build a deck of jokers, defeat bosses, modify cards, and conquer challenges across the ever-changing islands. At the table of four, win by chips or remaining health, your call...

title: It's Fine

title: Bruisers 2D Boxing
summary:
Step into the ring and fight your way to the top in Bruisers 2D Boxing — a gritty, retro-styled boxing RPG where every punch counts and every decision shapes your career.

Welcome to the unforgiving world of professional boxing. Build your legacy from the ground up — train hard, fight smart, and manage the life of an up-and-coming fighter chasing glory. With in-depth 2D boxing action and a rich career mode, Bruisers 2D Boxing captures the raw intensity of the sport like never before.

summary: A dark visual novel created by the team behind NEEDY GIRL OVERDOSE. Overly sensitive to other people's emotions, the protagonist—a light novel writer—develops the ability to read minds, only to be driven even deeper into isolation. His sole remaining comfort is his younger sister, gifted yet lonely.

Use problem solving, deduction and critical thinking skills to uncover the truth and maybe even expose a conspiracy in your own time.

Roll dice on beautifully crafted global city maps, use skills, control special tiles, play combo cards, challenge opponents, and collect legendary treasures. Win this urban adventure your way!

title: Moorestech

Produce items and research tech, evolving from windmills to fusion as you trace humanity’s tech evolution, then launch a rocket home to uncover the truth of your exile.

title: Demra: Rifts of War
summary: Use powerful light magic to fight back the invading demon hordes in this lite-RPG/ RTS mix. Build a base, gather resources, research and command your army.

summary: Can you evolve from a street thug into a savior? Manage your time and stats in this tactical Auto-Battler. Clear threats to stop the rising Fear before the city collapses. Build your hero, decide your fate.

summary: In this third-person action-adventure, use Lux’s gun skills and enhanced DNA abilities to clear out enemies as she searches for her missing mother. Along the way, level up and acquire loot to equip her - and her home base - with an insane variety of customisation options.

title: Nightwater
summary: Forage, craft and automate to grow your factory, unlock new technologies and expand your island to discover new biomes. Progress through the ages from sticks and stones to the Bronze Age, the Industrial Era and into the future to uncover the secret of the Lighthouse and escape this reality.

summary: Summon an army of Monster Girls to face your enemies in strategic battles! Defeat the Dark Lord's minions and expand your collection with cool, fierce and cute Monster Girls of all variety in this "Capsule Monsters" inspired game!

similarGames.name: Three Kingdoms: Fate of the Dragon

title: Myth of Valderit
summary:
Myth of Valderit is a psychological horror experience set in the cursed village of Valderit, inspired by the abandoned Catalan village of La Mussara. You wake up as Nil, separated from your friends Julia and Enric, and soon uncover the dark secrets lurking within the village…

This single-player, first-person experience combines exploration, survival, and puzzle-solving. Nil must endure and remain alive, evading the fanatical devotees of an unimaginable entity.

title: Pepper the Giant Purple Dog
summary: In this twist on a harmless pet simulator, take care of Pepper, who happens to be a giant purple dog. But when things go awry, you will have to decide: how many lives is one good boy worth?

title: Worming from Home

Throw your spineless body around the keyboard to invest in the stock market and earn obscene amounts of money. Buy upgrades, train skills, and worm your way up to the promotion you've always dreamed of!

title: Wukong Survivors: God Slayer
summary: Wukong Survivors" is a TPS + ROGUE game where players control Sun Wukong and his friends, sweeping through all visible enemies and rescuing their captured master.

Roadhouse is the prelude to Gas Station Simulator where you take on the role of the uncle and explore his humble beginnings. Start as a bouncer at a roadhouse on Route 66 and work your way up to running the entire business.

In this 1st person view simulator game you deal with a multitude of customers and various biker gangs, manage the roadhouse, tend to the bar, master the grill, stock the right supplies and acquire more territories to widen your influence.

title: Farming With Lasers
summary: Incinerate various pests with your giant laser, as you grow your farm. Purchase incremental upgrades to expedite the process.

title: Beyond The Cupola: ISS Simulator
summary: You are the ISS crew, where the station's fate depends on everyone. Oxygen leaks, system failures, meteorite threats — repair with your own hands and make real-time decisions. Complete missions, perform spacewalks. Experience life in orbit: in space, nothing goes according to plan.

title: Local Zombies

title: Tunnel Escape Fates Entwined

title: Kubika

title: Michael Test
summary: Michael Test is a point-and-click adventure game where you uncover hidden truths within classical paintings and follow faint traces of sound to deduce and choose the final ‘sin.’

title: WomboCombo
